programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Uruguay - Part 1
programme.desc: Six players enter the luxury Enjoy Punta Del Este resort looking to win $110,000 and this prestigious WPT title with 410 players down to six.

programme.desc: Six players enter the luxury Enjoy Punta Del Este resort looking to win $110,000 and this prestigious WPT title with 410 players down to six.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Rockstar Energy Cash Game - Part 1
programme.desc: Hollywood's Jennifer Tilly sits down at a high stakes cash game with WPT Champions Olivier Busquet and Art Papazyan along with high roller Bryn Kenney to play at Commerce Casino. Hundreds of thousands are on the table in Los Angeles!
programme.sub-title: WPT Rockstar Energy Cash Game - Part 1

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio High Roller - Part 1
programme.desc: Top-tier talent is in Las Vegas to play for $432,000 and the WPT Bellagio High Roller title. Join Phil Hellmuth and Vince Van Patten in the booth with Tom Marchese, Jake Schindler, Sam Soverel, and David Peters battling on the felt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Vegas Cash Game - Part 1
programme.desc: Big stars and personalities are in Las Vegas to play for hundreds of thousands of dollars and a Hublot watch. Ben Lamb, Kristen Bicknell, and Randall Emmett headline the star-studded lineup at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.desc: Big stars and personalities are in Las Vegas to play for hundreds of thousands of dollars and a Hublot watch. Ben Lamb, Kristen Bicknell, and Randall Emmett headline the star-studded lineup at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: ClubWPT Challenge the Champs - Part 1
programme.desc: Two ClubWPT qualifiers square off against WPT Champions Mike Sexton, Darren Elias, David Williams, Scotty Nguyen, and more in Las Vegas in a matchup for the ages of Pro versus Average Joe playing for $50,000.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: ClubWPT Challenge the Champs - Part 2
programme.desc: Two ClubWPT qualifiers square off against WPT Champions Mike Sexton, Darren Elias, David Williams, Scotty Nguyen, and more in Las Vegas in a matchup for the ages of Pro versus Average Joe playing for $50,000.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tunnel ved enden av lyset
programme.desc: Med femti partier ombord er Dylan vert for signeringen av New Commonwealth-charteret, men oppdager snart at det er inntrengere som har til hensikt å stoppe signeringen.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hvis hjulet er løst
programme.desc: Beka og Tyr blir overtatt av energien fra en dimensjonal tunnel. Dylan, Trance og Harper må redde dem før de ødelegger skipet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Skårene i Rimni
programme.desc: Dylan er innrammet for drap og må rydde navnet sitt mens han finner bitene i en vase som sies å gi eieren kosmos 'velsignelser.'

programme.title: Andromeda: Mad to Be Saved
programme.desc: Mannskapet redder en gruppe flyktninger, bare for å oppdage at de har vært utsatt for regjeringseksperimenter og er ekstremt ustabile.

programme.title: Andromeda: Cui Bono
programme.desc: Bekas onkel løper for kontoret i New Commonwealth, men et attentat får mannskapet til å opptre som hans sikkerhet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den ensomme og jevne sanden
programme.desc: Når Andromeda blir angrepet av rompirater, blir de reddet av et langt mistet romskip fra jorden.

programme.title: Andromeda: Slipfighter Hunder av Krig
programme.desc: Mannskapet oppdager at en falsk planet, Marduk, har skapt masseødeleggelsesvåpen.

programme.title: Andromeda: Lepras kyss
programme.desc: En hitman med navnet Leper er rettet mot lederne for det nye samveldet.

programme.title: Andromeda: For hvem bjelleveiene
programme.desc: Andromeda hjemsøkes av en mystisk skapning som kommer ombord under en solstorm.

programme.title: Andromeda: Og ditt hjerte vil fly bort
programme.desc: Når en forlengst mistet kjærlighet kommer tilbake, forsvinner Tyr fra skipet for å beskytte henne mot en snikmorder.
programme.sub-title: Og ditt hjerte vil fly bort

programme.title: Andromeda: Den ukontrable mannen
programme.desc: Sett i et alternativt univers der Dylan døde og Gaheris Rhade prøver å reformere Commonwealth.

programme.title: Andromeda: Delenda Est
programme.desc: Gruppen som angrep Andromeda under den første undertegningen av Commonwealth-charteret, vender tilbake til mer kaos.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Dark Backward
programme.desc: Trance går gjennom noen forskjellige scenarier og prøver å finne en der mannskapet hennes ikke dør.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Risk-All Point
programme.desc: Et kraftigere Andromeda-skip eksploderer på grunn av sannsynlig sabotasje, og tvinger Dylans mannskap til å redde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den rette hesten
programme.desc: Beka setter både mannskapet og en hel planet i fare når en tidligere kjærlighet dukker opp.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hva skjer med en revidert utsatt?
programme.desc: Andromeda mottar et rop om hjelp fra pastor Bam.
programme.sub-title: Hva skjer med en revidert utsatt?

programme.title: Andromeda: Spydspunktet
programme.desc: Etter at en Commonwealth-planet er angrepet av pyriske pyroformere, blir Dylan tvunget til å kjempe for å beskytte den nye planeten.

programme.title: Andromeda: Himmelhvelvet
programme.desc: Dylan hører stemmer som tilsier ham til en planet med 'ild og is'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Deep Midnight's Voice
programme.desc: Mens han er fanget i en kamp mellom to Nietzschean-stolthetspunkter, fanger mannskapet en fiendtlig som hevder at stoltheten hans har et kart over slipstream.

programme.title: Andromeda: Illusjonen av majestet
programme.desc: En feil sving etter å ha gått ut av en slipstream sender Andromeda inn i Prolon-systemet. De redder en fluktpute fra en viss katastrofe, men stoltheten vil ha den tilbake.

programme.title: Andromeda: Twilight of the Idols
programme.desc: Mannskapet søker en tapt koloni av Nietzscheans og oppdager et annet mannskap som i det skjulte har hjulpet dem.

programme.title: MTV Catfish
programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: For six years, a serial killer prowled the streets of New York City. He wrote letters to police and The New York Post, indicating he would kill twelve people — one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in your Eyes
programme.desc: A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men called police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called. The investigation uncovered even more unusual circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of employees' jobs. Forensic investigators must determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine motorcade for the Queen of England. But on the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of jobs. Forensic investigators had to determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error, or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Police investigate a discarded sleeping bag containing bloody sneakers and a purse, which eventually leads to the body of a young woman. A mark found on the victim's body enables police to track the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. Since she has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, police assume it's a hunting accident — until they find a strange letter, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: An Alaskan police officer finds a woman's body while on routine patrol of a public park. During the autopsy, the medical examiner preserves the portion of her rib cage which sustained the fatal wound.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delicti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'Em Up
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: A man disappears one year to the day after beginning an affair with his friend's wife. 15 years later, with the help of a metal detector, police find evidence that would prove what had happened and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A go-go dancer told her family she needed to get away for a while and then she simply disappeared. Investigators were suspicious, because she took neither her car nor her clothes. 20 years later, her family received a call that changed everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is the victim of a well-planned crime. Investigators suspect two weapons and two killers. But forensic evidence points them in a different direction — one much closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California firefighters battled ten arson fires in three weeks. When cigarettes and a scrap of paper connected the case to similar fires further north, the hunt was on for a dangerous pyromaniac.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: In 2002, a small community in upstate New York was devastated when Patty Wlasiuk died in a truck accident. But burdock seed pods found in her hair and on her clothes indicated that this was no accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate tycoon goes missing, it appears to be foul play. In his will, he leaves instructions in case he should die under violent circumstances — which were carried out after a hiker comes across his bullet-ridden skull.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Stranger
programme.desc: The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Crazy Don
programme.desc: To the FBI, he was believed to be the boss of New York's most powerful mafia organizationthe Genovese crime family. Was Gigante crazy or was his behavior a shrewd attempt to disguise his position as a ruthless mafia boss?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Abroad
programme.desc: Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Held For Ransom
programme.desc: Wealth has its rewards, but it also brings its dangers. Kidnapping is one of them. No ordeal is more horrifying for a family than to have a child taken.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Family Torn
programme.desc: The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Model Killer
programme.desc: It's a model's job to rivet the public's attention. But in 1984, some aspiring models began attracting publicity in a terrible new way.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cracking The Cartel
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dead Run
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, an inmate escaped with the help of his female accomplice. Following a trail of fraudulent credit card receipts and deaths, authorities track the pair, but always find themselves one step behind.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dishonored
programme.desc: Shirley Russell was determined enough to reach the rank of Captain in the United States Marine Corps. When this officer turned up missing, her colleagues refused to believe she had gone AWOL. It was unclear whether Captain Shirley Russell was alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scent Of The Kill
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead Wrong
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Vanished
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tainted Blood
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Dealings
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial Of The Century
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In the Camera's Eye
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Signed In Blood
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Encounter
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Natural Witness
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Absent Witness
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Medical Examiners's Casebook
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims. And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder. These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Killers
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Abduction
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear, kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Identity
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Hidden Obsessions
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Error
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Bump In The Bingo Hall
programme.desc: The team head out to Blackpool for a day out at the seaside that they will never forget. Investigating one of Blackpool's iconic buildings The Empire Bingo Hall. Many famous acts have played here and it seems that some may have never left.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Night Before The Storm
programme.desc: In this special episode, it's the night before Sean and Bex are joined by their celebrity guest and they check out The Black Horse in Pluckley Village to investigate the paranormal hauntings at the most haunted pub in the UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1
programme.desc: The team heads to Lincolnshire to investigate the Village Farm Museum. This location looks out of place, being in the middle of a residential housing estate.
programme.sub-title: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 2
programme.desc: This fascinating location sees a twist in the activity with Bex and Sean getting more than they bargained for.
programme.sub-title: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Brookside
programme.desc: Multiple ghostly sightings have been reported that could be connected to the close, but what will Sean and Bex encounter during the day for a special Ghost Dimension Lock Down investigation?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Stockport to investigate a haunted mill, which has a lift with a mind all of its own. Will any of the ghosts haunting the mill join him on the investigation tonight or will it all go pear shaped?
programme.sub-title: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Pear 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the mill and is attacked by a spirit. Jane joins the investigation with surprising results. Will it have a happy ending?
programme.sub-title: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Pear 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean enters one of the UK's most haunted escape rooms and it appears that he is not the only one trying to escape. Will the spirits play games with him tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 2
programme.desc: The investigation continues at the escape room and a certain spirit attempts to tug at Sean's clothing. Will he finally survive the escape room?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Buried inside the Bombing Decoy
programme.desc: A Second World War bombing decoy site at Formby. It was commissioned in December 1940 as a 'Permanent Starfish' site to deflect enemy bombing from the city of Liverpool and it is now home to a whole host of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fun and Games at The Sportsman Inn
programme.desc: Bex, Sean and Paul, investigate claims of paranormal incidents inside of a haunted inn. Once three separate cottages, will any of the previous residents join the investigation tonight? Or is there something more sinister haunting here?
programme.sub-title: Fun and Games at The Sportsman Inn

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Poltergeist Nightmare at 30 East Drive
programme.desc: The team step into a house that has become a legend with the paranormal community, 30 East Drive, Pontefract.
programme.sub-title: A Poltergeist Nightmare at 30 East Drive

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: The Club
programme.desc: One haunted members only club and a bar full if spirits. Ghost Dimension capture ghostly goings on, inside of Aintree Conservative Club. A place never investigated before and has paranormal activity daily.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: House of Fear
programme.desc: Located in Gran Canaria, there is one house that locals refuse to enter and that is, The House of Fear. Ghostly shadows, loud banging and demonic voices have all been reported here and the Ghost Dimension team will investigate these claims tonight.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Last Orders at The Fleece Inn
programme.desc: The team heads to Elland to investigate ghostly-goings on in this haunted pub. It's not just the spirits behind the bar lurking here. Multiple hauntings, murders and death surround this public house.
programme.sub-title: Last Orders at The Fleece Inn

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Souls Seeking Solace Gotts Park Mansion
programme.desc: The team encounters a spirit member joining them on the thermal imaging camera and appearing to leave its ghostly hand print behind.
programme.sub-title: Souls Seeking Solace Gotts Park Mansion

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Underground World Of The City of Caves
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team ventures underground to investigate the City of Caves in Nottingham.
programme.sub-title: Underground World Of The City of Caves

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Dangerous Demon of The Stork Inn
programme.desc: Sean heads to Wigan to investigate a location with history dating back to 900AD. Encountering a spirit that attacks him, will the team be safe tonight as they come face to face with pure evil?
programme.sub-title: Dangerous Demon of The Stork Inn

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Buried Beneath The Bowling Green
programme.desc: Buried under the location Sean investigates tonight, is the bones of the deceased and it appears that they are at unrest. Will Sean solve the mystery of who is haunting this location?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Chose the Molester Over Your Kids
programme.desc: Jackie’s family doesn't trust her boyfriend around her children, but she insists on staying with him. What horrible truth will Shaqualla's lie detector test reveal about her man?
programme.sub-title: You Chose the Molester Over Your Kids

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do I Have a Child With a Gay Man?
programme.desc: Are Tracy and Latonia's men leading secret double lives with other men? What will the lie detector test results reveal about Kanecha and Mike?
programme.sub-title: Do I Have a Child With a Gay Man?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA Shockers
programme.desc: Monique and Ashley find out who their newborn babies' fathers are on today's Steve Wilkos Show!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: This Should Be Explosive...
programme.desc: Katrina believes her sister Kendra’s boyfriend is a cheater and having sex with her best friend Nay-Nay! Later, John returns to the stage with a shocking update!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do You Need a Medic or Are You Guilty?
programme.desc: Michelle needs answers about who hurt her daughter. She will stop at nothing to protect her baby. Will the father James clear his name on Steve's stage?
programme.sub-title: Do You Need a Medic or Are You Guilty?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA: Don't Run From the Results
programme.desc: Roberta suspects that her husband Bryan has been cheating. They both believe the other is cheating. Find out whether these men are really the father on today's Steve Wilkos!
programme.sub-title: DNA: Don't Run From the Results

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did
programme.desc: Shannan claims Tim fathered her child. He doesn't buy it because he doesn't recall having sex with her! Later, Ayana is furious that her boyfriend Patrick denies their son!
programme.sub-title: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This
programme.desc: Is Khadisa's boyfriend Chad cheating on her with her own sister? Will Maya's ex trust her and her current beau with their infant son?
programme.sub-title: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
programme.desc: Will Nadia and Woody's lie detector test results prove that they were negligent and deserved to lose custody of their children? Then, can Steve set the record straight about Josette's daughter?
programme.sub-title: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The 1,000th Episode!
programme.desc: On the 1,000th episode, we'll bring you all of the crazy confessions, explosive meltdowns, chair throws, funny moments and the heartfelt stories that have made this show special!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Saw Right Through You
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Maurice wants to prove to his girlfriend that he's faithful. Plus Chuanhtee says fed up with Ladi's cheating accusations! Watch as the truth is revealed!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Have Two Husbands
programme.desc: Jessica married Gian after a five-month relationship. With a baby on the way, everything seems to be going great for the couple, except Jessica is married to another man, Michael!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: An Explosive DNA Story
programme.desc: Teneal and Richard are telling different tales, each alleging the other is unfit to parent! The truth will come down to a lie detector test, and the results will be shocking!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.
programme.desc: Today Danny is finally ready to face the missing man in his life and get answers to lifelong questions. Steven offers a number of excuses for not seeing his son, but can he redeem himself?
programme.sub-title: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Two years ago, Latisha and her boyfriend were found shot to death in their car. Latisha’s mother Nancy believes her ex-husband Kenneth was involved. Who is responsible for their deaths?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant
programme.desc: Megan is 14 and pregnant with 19 year old Michael’s baby, but he doesn’t see any problems with this situation. Laurie, Megan’s mother, turns to Steve to help get through to her!
programme.sub-title: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, Get Him Out!
programme.desc: Kelly’s ex-husband Nikki continues to haunt her. He went to jail for killing her 2 week old son and is now dating her 18 year old daughter! Can Steve get Nikki out of their lives forever?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Mother in Denial
programme.desc: When ordinary people need help, Steve Wilkos is ready to answer the call. Watch as Steve helps ordinary people stand up for themselves and fight for what he believes in order to promote justice for all.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Mother's Rage
programme.desc: Three years later, Elizabeth still carries strong doubts about Manny's intentions with her family and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is Manny innocent?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Mommy Hurt Me
programme.desc: Stephanie’s drug addiction led her to neglect and abuse her kids. Scott’s fiancée stepped up as a mother and Stephanie failed multiple drug tests, he doesn’t want her near the kids, but wants her to atone for her wrongs!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?
programme.desc: Maria claims that her son’s ex Amy and her new boyfriend Brian are abusing and neglecting her granddaughter. But Amy says Maria is a racist and angry over raising her grandchild in a Hispanic home!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: What Happened to My Baby?
programme.desc: Baby Garrett died of an oxycodone drug overdose while in Sharon’s care. His mother Casey left him with Sharon so she could visit her husband Kenneth in the hospital. Who’s responsible?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Preying on the Innocent
programme.desc: When the son of a prominent politician is murdered in his basement, Lt. Joe Kenda feels pressure from City Hall to solve the case.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Case That Haunts Me
programme.desc: As Det. Joe Kenda digs into another murder, he uncovers a world of violence and sexual fetishes, culminating in perhaps the most intense interrogation of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: We Kill the Ones We Love
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves Van Terry dead; to crack the case, Lt. Joe Kenda must put his faith… in a burglar.
programme.sub-title: We Kill the Ones We Love

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Nine-Year-Old Hostage
programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Door No. 12
programme.desc: Neighbors are stunned when close friends Louis Matos and Colleen Johnson are gunned down for no apparent reason. The case kicks into high gear when Lt Joe Kenda locates a panic-stricken eyewitness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Powder Kegs
programme.desc: When uninvited guests crash a barrio birthday party, violence erupts—leaving Enrique Urrutia dead and potentially sparking a gang war.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Confession
programme.desc: After a husband and wife are viciously attacked in their own home, Kenda is on the hunt for a troubled teen whose appetite for violence knows no bounds.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Joker In the Pack
programme.desc: A card game is interrupted by gunfire, leaving a young man dead. Lt. Joe Kenda soon learns the seeds of his destruction were sewn earlier the same day.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Too Young To Die
programme.desc: A frenzied ambush at a hamburger stand leaves a 16-year old boy dead. Lt. Joe Kenda must cut through a mountain of rumor and innuendo in order to zero in on his prime suspect.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Haunts Me
programme.desc: A young mother-to-be is shot and left for dead. To catch her assailant, Kenda must elicit a death-bed confession from the victim herself.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Razor’s Edge
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Manifesto
programme.desc: A cabin on the slopes of Pikes Peak catches fire, and a young sheriff’s deputy is posted to guard the scene overnight--then he’s found dead in his patrol car the next morning.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Shoelace Killer
programme.desc: A party on the outskirts of the city turns into a nightmare for some teenagers when they discover a woman’s corpse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Weapon of Choice
programme.desc: When mother of two Shaundra Murr is run over in front of her house, officers initially suspect a hit and run. Until Lt. Joe Kenda uncovers evidence proving Shaundra’s murder was a crime of passion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Slaughterhouse Six
programme.desc: Solider and young father Layne Schmidtke is brutally beaten to death by a mob of teenagers. Kenda must reconstruct the chaotic scene through forensic evidence and witness testimonies.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Last Call for Murder
programme.desc: Five people are shot in a cold-blooded robbery. With much of the evidence lost in a fire set by the suspect. An exhaustive manhunt ends in a chilling confrontation with an Eagle Scout turned killer.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You Told Her?!
programme.desc: Heidi og Spencer blir sjokkerte over at oppførselen deres blir diskutert. Audrina står ved en korsvei med både Brody og Sean; samtidig foretar Caroline en djerv påstand om sine ekte følelser for Kaitlynn.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I'm Back in LA Bitches!
programme.desc: Gjengen feirer Kristin Cavallaris besøk i LA. Det er anspent mellom Heidi og Audrina. Justin og Jason styrker vennskapet. En bra natt blir til en god morgen da Brody og Audrina endelig setter følelsene sine på prøve.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: "Who Slept at Your House?"
programme.desc: Da Kristin har grillet Brody om 'overnattingen' hos Audrina, går ryktene under en tur til Lake Tahoe, og Kaitlynn føler seg utenfor. Caroline konfronterer Kaitlynn om det kalde vennskapet. Jason hører Spencer tvile på edrueligheten sin.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Get Dessert and Bail
programme.desc: Brody og Audrinas flørting blir hetere. Krigen mellom Pratt- og Wahler-familiene koker over, mens Brandon blir fryst ut av Danis kalde skulder etter at de flyttet sammen. Audrina og Heidis vennskap er ved et veiskille.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Time Heals Not Some Things
programme.desc: Heidi og Spencer søker hjelp for sin finansielle situasjon. Mens Kaitlynns nye forhold fortsetter å blomstre, truer en av Brandons gamle flørter å ødelegge ting mellom ham og Dani. Justin og faren blir kjent igjen etter en vanskelig tid.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: That's Math Right There
programme.desc: Kaitlynns avgjørelse om å flytte inn med kjæresten får alle til å lure på hva som skjer. Heidi & Spencer bekymrer seg for selskapet. Brandon revurderer forholdet sitt, mens Audrina får en vekker angående Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: What About Me?
programme.desc: På Speidis velværeanstalt går det rykter om at Kaitlynn er gravid. Brandon avslører sjokkerenede nyheter om forholdet. Familien Wahlers kamp for å slutte fred med familien Pratt, blir distrahert av mulige skjellsettende forandringer for egen del.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Timing Is Everything
programme.desc: Kaitlynn knekker nyheten om sin graviditet til Brody, men er urolig når han og Kris skal møtes på fristedet. Pratt- og Wahler-gjengen håndterer endelig feiden som har delt gruppen. Justin får lære viktigheten av å vedlikeholde kontakter.

programme.title: The Hills: New City, New Drama
programme.desc: Når Lauren Conrad må mestre både moteskolen, en krevende praktikantjobb og en uforutsigbar romkamerat som ødelegger for henne, forstår hun raskt at alt er stort i Los Angeles, også hennes egne problemer.

programme.title: The Hills: A Change of Plans
programme.desc: Når Heidi fikser et intervju for drømmejobben som får henne til å overveie å hoppe av skolen permanent, forstår Lauren at hun og Heidi kanskje har helt forskjellige mål.

programme.title: The Hills: An Unexpected Call
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sender Lauren på et oppdrag til New York City, men vel tilbake i L.A. venter det henne en stor overraskelse fra fortiden. Heidi skjønner at å jobbe med festreklamering ikke bare er en fest.

programme.title: The Hills: Lauren and Jason: Part 2
programme.desc: Da Jason, Laurens eksflamme fra Laguna Beach, dukker opp igjen i livet hennes, forstår hun at hun kanskje ikke er så ferdig med ham som hun trodde. Samtidig, i sin nye jobb, spør Heidi seg om det egentlig er verdt alt strevet.

programme.title: The Hills: Jason's Birthday
programme.desc: Lauren haster hjem fra en lang Teen Vogue-event for å være sammen med Jason på bursdagen hans, men kvelden blir ikke som forventet. Audrina ber Heidi om råd rundt hennes nyeste date, modellen og skuespilleren Danny.

programme.title: The Hills: Boyfriends and Work Don't Mix
programme.desc: Jason utvikler seg til å bli et forstyrrende moment i Laurens profesjonelle og akademiske liv. Heidi får endelig mulighet til å jobbe i nattklubbene, men tidspunktet kunne ikke ha vært dårligere.

programme.title: The Hills: Somebody Always Has to Cry
programme.desc: Det er gjengens første ferie i L.A. og ikke alle får det de ønsket seg. Et nyttårskyss skal vise seg å bli litt av en oppgave for Lauren, når Jason finner ut at hun fikk en uventet telefon fra en gammel flamme.

programme.title: The Hills: You Can't Just Be With Me?
programme.desc: Jason vil gjerne gjøre Laurens 20-årsdag spesiell, men når hun lyver for ham angående en jobb med mannelige modeller for et Teen Vogue-oppdrag, settes forholdet deres på prøve.
programme.sub-title: You Can't Just Be With Me?

programme.title: The Hills: Love is Not a Maybe Thing
programme.desc: Heidi bestemmer endelig at hun har opplevd nok dramatikk med Jordan. Lauren og Jason tenker på å gå et hakk videre.
programme.sub-title: Love is Not a Maybe Thing

programme.title: The Hills: Timing is Everything
programme.desc: Når Laurens harde jobbing under moteuken i L.A. fører til tidenes største karrieremulighet, føler hun seg dradd mellom jobben sin og kjæresten sin.

programme.title: The Hills: Out With The Old
programme.desc: Etter en vaklevoren sommer med kjæresten Jason, bestemmer Lauren seg for å gjøre det slutt og drar tilbake til Teen Vogue for å møte sin mindre glade sjef. Heidi får problemer med en fyr som både hun og Audrina dater.

programme.title: The Hills: When You Least Expect It
programme.desc: Lauren går på sin første date siden Jason, og blir satt på prøve på jobben når hun bes om å gjøre sitt første moteshow. Heidi har en livsavgjørende hemmelighet hun må fortelle om til kjæresten sin.

programme.title: The Hills: The Best Night Ever
programme.desc: Når Audrina dukker opp i Heidis bursdag uten invitasjon, forstår hun at Heidi ikke er villig til å tilgi og glemme. Lauren, som har bestemt seg for å konsentrere seg om jobben, blir forført av sjarmen til Brody, den nye typen i livet hennes.

programme.title: The Hills: Who Do You Trust?
programme.desc: Audrina forteller Heidi at Spencer er en lurendreier, men Heidi stiller seg tvilende - til hun ser det med egen øyne. Lauren fortsetter å lure på om hun er klar for et forhold.

programme.title: The Hills: One Big Interruption
programme.desc: Heidi tar en pause fra Spencer, men savner ham mer en hun trodde hun ville. Lauren må planlegge en Teen Vogue-middag, men distraheres når hun må hjelpe praktikanten Emily fra New York.

programme.title: The Hills: You Have Chosen
programme.desc: Når Lauren forteller Heidi hva hun egentlig syns om Spencer, må Heidi velge mellom bestevennen sin og kjæresten.

programme.title: The Hills: With Friends Like These...
programme.desc: Lauren forstår at hun ikke kan stole på bestevennene sine etter at Heidi spleiser Jen med Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: Enough Is Enough
programme.desc: Spencer ber Heidi om å flytte inn hos ham, men Heidi vet ikke hva hun skal gjøre, eller hvordan hun skal fortelle det til samboeren Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills: New Year, New Friends
programme.desc: Laurens 21-årsdag er full av overraskelser - Heidi og Audrina holder selskap for henne. Jen gjør et forsøk på å slutte fred med Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills: Apology Not Accepted
programme.desc: Lauren fyller 21 år og Heidi har store planer for bursdagsfeiringen. Men, rett før festen bestemmer Heidi seg for å fortelle Lauren om Spencers ide om at de skal flytte sammen.

programme.title: The Hills: Goodbye for Now
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen når spenningen sitt toppunkt når Heidi tar et endelig valg angående å flytte sammen med Spencer. Lauren går til Audrina for å fylle tomrommet etter bestevennen sin, og Whitney flyr til New York City til et intervju.

programme.title: The Hills: You Know What You Did
programme.desc: Lauren drar ikke til Heidi og Spencers innflyttingsfest da hun får høre at Heidi har spredd rykter om henne. Men når Lauren og Heidi støter på hverandre, begynner de å krangle verre enn de noen gang har gjort før.

programme.title: The Hills: Big Girls Don't Cry
programme.desc: Lauren og Heidi glir enda lenger fra hverandre når Spencer frir til Heidi. Audrina går inn for sitt forhold med en tidligere kjæreste, og Lauren drar tilbake til Laguna Beach for å rådføre seg.

programme.title: The Hills: Truth And Time Tells All
programme.desc: Lauren hjelper Audrina med å avgjøre om Justin er kjærestemateriale, men Audrina har allerede tatt sitt valg. Heidi forstår at å være forlovet ikke bare er lek og alskens moro.

programme.title: The Hills: Meet The Parents
programme.desc: Slik jeg ser det: Opplev dine yndlingsrealityskuespillere og yndlingssituasjoner - med en komisk vri. Alt og all, fra Lauren til Spencer - ingen eller ingenting er trygge for den ene skuespilleren som alene spiller hver eneste rolle i serien.

programme.title: The Hills: Rolling With The Enemy
programme.desc: Heidis omgangskrets minker når Spencer "slår opp" med Brody fordi han vanker med Lauren. Audrina vil at forholdet til Justin skal være offisielt, men han nekter å binde seg.

programme.title: The Hills: Second Chances
programme.desc: Lauren opplever et pust fra fortiden da hennes ekskjæreste Jason ringer. Heidi konkurrerer med kollegaen Elodie om en forfremmelse på jobben.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Deano & Paris
programme.desc: Deano er desperat etter å bli kvitt mannebrystene og bli like veltrent som kompisene, og kanskje få seg date. Paris øsker å temme kurvene og få tilbake selvtilliten. Men vil de klare forandringene før deres Ex on the Beach-avsløring?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Becci & Kieran
programme.desc: Becci er lei av å være den tjukke søsteren og vil gå ned i vekt. Kieran er lei av å være liten og vil legge på seg. Vil de klare endringene før de må vise frem alt i 'Ex on the Beach'-avsløringen?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Ronan & Camilla
programme.desc: Ronan har lagt på seg mange kilo og kommer seg ikke videre, mens Camilla vil komme i form til jenteferien hun skal på. Vil de klare å ta grep før deres Ex on the Beach-oppvisning?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Shelbie and Liv & Vanessa
programme.desc: Studentene Shelbie & Liv har lagt på seg masse og må slanke seg og trene. Vanessa drømmer om å ha en kvinnelig fribryter-kropp. Vil de klare å endre kroppene sine før de skal vise seg frem i 'Ex on the Beach'-avsløringen?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Sheena & Georgia
programme.desc: Sheena må ned i vekt før drømme-bryllupsreisen, og Georgia må slanke seg for å finne tilbake til sitt gamle jeg. Vil de klare å endre sine liv i tide til 'Ex on the Beach'-avsløringen?

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Dinner Dates With A Side Of Ex
programme.desc: De single kjendisene møtes til en fest ved bassenget og dykker ned i romansen. Men når Terrorpadden kunngjør at de skal ha middagsdater, blir de sjokkert da de får høre at de vil bli servert en eks den første kvelden.
programme.sub-title: Dinner Dates With A Side Of Ex

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Overraskelse
programme.desc: Det er alt eller intet for Finn og Paige Ashley tviler forholdet med Jarred under kjendisfesten på strandklubben, og da en stor overraskende kjendis ankommer føler Yaz seg tatt på senga.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: I'm gone
programme.desc: Yaz og Chloe Brockett snakker ut, mens Finn og Paige sliter med å bo i villaen sammen. En ny eks ryster et par, og viser seg å være for mye for en kjendis.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Love's A Bumpy Ride
programme.desc: Chloe Veitch og Finn kommer næmere hverandre, noe som er tøft for Paige. Sprekker oppstår i Yaz og Chloe Brocketts vennskap og den overraskende ankomsten til en eks truer et par.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Lion Ex
programme.desc: Chloe Veitch havner i en kjærlighetstriangel. Yaz og Chloe Brocketts vennskap krasjer. Båtfesten blir rystet av en eks på en vannskuter og tre kjendiser blir sendt til stranden der neste eks lurer i mørket.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Night Beach
programme.desc: Lockie og Yaz har en emosjonell gjenforening, men hvordan skal de klare å bo sammen? Chloe satser alle kort på en person, og en djevelsk kjendisbombe ryster villaen, men hvem er ut av spill?

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Only Way Is Ex
programme.desc: To ekser blir eliminerte, og James er knust. Yaz og Lockie prøver å løse problemene sine en siste gang. En ny kjendis skaper furore og villaen sier farvel til en original.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: History Repeating Itself
programme.desc: Etter en følsom dobbel-eliminasjon er Jarred frustrert og opprørt, Tamara frykter at historien gjentar seg selv med Jessika Powers og Callum tar sjansen.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Hanging on by a Thread
programme.desc: En ny kjendis-eks truer med å splitte et allerede skjørt par; Tamara er endelig ferdig med Joe og Paige befinner seg i en kjærlighetstriangel med gammel og ny.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Burning Ceremony
programme.desc: En sjokkerende eliminasjon ryster villaen. Paige har en stor avgjørelse å ta og den siste natten får kjendisene til å gråte i en brenne-seremoni.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Can You Handle The Table Of Truth?
programme.desc: Sexy singler kommer til stranden for å granske fortiden og utforske fremtiden sin. Men moro bli kaos når de tre eksene bombarderer villaen med sannhetsbomber. Er de i stand til å håndtere sannheten når de konfronteres?
programme.sub-title: Can You Handle The Table Of Truth?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Ain't That a Beach
programme.desc: En forvirrende avsløring i hemmelighullet gir Da'Vonne en sannhet hun ikke kan flykte fra. En ny eks kan ikke bestemme seg for om de er her for kjærlighet eller skikkelig hevn. En omgang 'sannhet eller konsekvens' får opp dampen med et treveiskyss.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: The Lengths We Go To Lie to an Ex
programme.desc: Sannhetsbrettet avslører hvor langt Jamar går for å beholde en hemmelighet for eksene, mens Rays spiller tar ham igjen. En ny eks ankommer og avbryter en pågående kjærlighetstriangel.
programme.sub-title: The Lengths We Go To Lie to an Ex

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Wait, That's Not an Ex
programme.desc: Nye singler kommer i en sjokkerende vri, og vender villaen opp ned. Et par tar forholdet til et nytt nivå, og skaper fyrverkeri. Hemmelighullet sjokkerer Arisce med sannheten om hva Mike egentlig syns om forholdet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Vanessa's Ford Festiva L.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Jonathan's Honda CRX.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride

programme.title: Pimp My Ride

programme.title: Pimp My Ride

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Andrew's Cadillac Fleetwood Hearse.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen Niles Cadillac Sedan DeVille. Nile ruller hjem i en mørkerosa metallic bil med bagasjerommet fullt av nye sko.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Logans Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. Logan ruller hjem med basketgulv og lakk i to farger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1992 Honda Civic
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Christines Honda Civic. Tre dager etter at avsnittet med Christine ble sendt, døde en nær slektning av magekreft.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1990 Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Antwons Mitsubishi Mirage. Antwon ruller hjem på 18-tommersdekk og med et akvarium i baksetet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Shondas Ford Mustang Convertible. Hun ruller i vei i et pimpet og helt trafikksikkert kjøretøy.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Maxima Station Wagon
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Ezras Nissan Maxima Station Wagon. Han kjører av gårde i en mobil DJ-bås.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Volkswagen Baja
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Krissys Volkswagen Baja Bug. Boblen fra 1969 ble konstruert med holdbarhet som mål. Men med sitt bøyde eksosrør og sine ødelagte dører, kan den virkelig beskrives som alt annet enn akkurat det.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1987 Honda CRX
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Brians Honda CRX. Det er den første bilen som får en splitter ny motor, ettersom den gamle dør innen Xzibit får den inn på verkstedet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: '72 Landcruiser
programme.desc: Gaby var en nylig dumpet yogainstruktør som ikke hadde noe i verden utenom yogamatten sin og sin Land Cruiser fra 1972. Ekskjæresten solgte bilen til henne for 200 dollar. Gutta begynner å jobbe med utsiden...

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Escort
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Kerrys Ford Escort. Bilen var blitt sveiset og "limt sammen" av to separate biler. Gjengen mente den var trafikkfarlig...

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit takes a beat-up 1984 Cadillac Eldorado and restores it to it's former glory.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit and the boys at West Coast Customs transform a '91 Ford Escort into a European luxury mobile.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit and West Coast Customs give a 1958 VW some California love, and turn it into the ultimate beach ride.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit takes a busted off-road '85 Suburban and gives it an electronic makeover not to be believed.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit puts the fire back into a wrecked '87 Chevy Blazer.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit and West Coast Customs help a 1988 Acura Legend live up to its name.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: When Xzibit rolls on into the garage with the Fairlane, the boys can't believe their eyes. So they decide to give West his Fairlane back to tinker with and get him a brand-new pimped Toyota 4Runner.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit and the boys at West Coast pimp Nate's Ford Econoline.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Sara's Chevrolet S-10.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Brooke's Chevrolet Cavalier Convertible.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Tom's Chevrolet Caprice.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps JT's Honda Civic.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Jekara's Chevrolet Bel Air.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Eric's Mitsubishi Eclipse.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit and the boys at West Coast get an unforgettable surprise when they discover a previous tenant living inside a neglected 1976 Pacer.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Josh's Toyota Corolla.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Heather's Chevrolet C10.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Tin's Dodge Caravan.

programme.title: iCarly: Det spøker på Halloween
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie sender iCarly fra en leilighet som det sies at det spøker i. Når det begynner å skje nifse ting, begynner også vennene å bli redde for at spøkelsesryktene er sanne.

programme.title: iCarly: En dag jeg vil angre
programme.desc: Spencer redder livet til hovedsangeren i The Plain White T's og får ham til å gå med på å delta i iCarly. Merkelige ting begynner å gå feil midt i Carlys, Sams og Freddies nettvideosending.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjensittingen
programme.desc: Sam må sitte igjen den kvelden iCarly holder sin 50. nettvideospesialsending. Carly og Freddie kan da altså ikke gjøre som de pleier, så de prøver så godt de kan å få gjennsitting de også, så de kan sende fra skolebenken med Sam.

programme.title: iCarly: Fotsår reklame
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie blir invitert til Dakas hovedkvarter, der de blir tilbudt en stor pengesum får å gå god for Dakas nye sko, Tech-foten, på iCarly. Men det viser seg at skoene er forferdelige.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg lover å ikke sladre
programme.desc: Carly får en B på historieprøven hun burde ha fått en A på. Sam, som griper sjansen på sitt ukentlige møte med rektor Franklin, forandrer Carlys karakter på datamaskinen og overrasker henne med A blank.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly redder TV
programme.desc: En prestisjetung produsent vil gjøre iCarly om til et TV-show. Men Carly, Sam og Freddie blir raskt fortvilet når de hører om alle de store forandringene produsenten ønsker å foreta.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg hater Sams kjæreste
programme.desc: Sam får en kjæreste og de to blir uadskillelige. Men når forholdet begynner å få følger for iCarly, forstår Carly og Freddie at de må gjøre noe.

programme.title: iCarly: Overvåket
programme.desc: Etter å ha sett et klipp på iCarly der en mann selger illegale piratkopivideoer, bestemmer to detektiver seg for å bruke Carly og Spencers loft for overvåking.

programme.title: iCarly: Skolebytte
programme.desc: Carly får vite at hun får mulighet til å få et fullt stipend til en privat eliteskole pga nettshowet sitt. Skolen er Briarwood. Carly er i sterk tvil, men Sam og Freddie vet de må få henne til å gå for det.

programme.title: iCarly: Fektedrama
programme.desc: Freddie trenger litt guttetid, så han slår seg sammen med Spencer for å dra og fekte. Freddie er et naturtalent, men ting blir innviklet når Spencer får ham med i en kamp mot den utrolige Doug Toder.

programme.title: iCarly: Vinn en date
programme.desc: Når vennen deres Gibby er for sjenert for å be ut jenta han liker, bestemmer gjengen seg for å gjøre ham og hans flamme til deltagere i et "iWin A Date" innslag på nettvideoshowet deres

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg så han først
programme.desc: Når Carly og Sam viser interesse for den samme fyren, lover de at han ikke skal komme imellom dem. Men det er vanskelig, og når de slåss om hans oppmerksomhet, blir vennskapet deres satt på prøve.

programme.title: iCarly: Pack rat
programme.desc: Carly må trå til når Spencer blir avhengig av et videospil. Sam lurer Freddie til å tro at han blir forfulgt av uhell når han nekter å sende et kjedebrev videre.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skylder deg en
programme.desc: Sam blir fornærmet når Freddie beskylder henne for ikke å betale ham og Carly noen av de pengene tilbake som hun konstant låner. Sam prøver iherdig å betale dem tilbake - hun finner seg en ordentlig jobb.

programme.title: iCarly: Hubert Lewbert
programme.desc: En "Lur Lewbert"-sketsj går helt galt og skader Carlys irriterende portvakt. Gjengen pleier ham inntil Freddies mor tar over. Men når kærligheten begynner å blomstre, må de sette en stopper for det.

programme.title: iCarly: Pie
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Spencer tar med Freddie til deres yndlingskonditori, finner de ut at eieren er død. Men enda verre er det at oppskriftene hans kanskje er gått tapt for alltid.

programme.title: iCarly: Jul
programme.desc: I et forsøk på å pifte opp julen med et utradisjonelt tre, kommer Spencer til å sette fyr på alle Carlys gaver. Fortvilet ønsker hun seg at hun hadde en normal bror.

programme.title: iCarly: Kysset
programme.desc: Sam overhører Freddie fortelle Carly at han aldri har kysset en jente, og avslører hemmeligheten hans på netshowet. Gibby og Carly trener Spencer til utttaket for det lokale, profesjonelle fotballaget.

programme.title: iCarly: Bilbråk
programme.desc: Gjengen holder en konkurranse på iCarly, og premien er en ny bil fra en lokal forhandler. Etter at Nevel vinner, oppdager barna at forhandleren ikke visste noe om konkurransen eller bilen de skulle ha donert bort som premie.

programme.title: iCarly: Fred
programme.desc: Freddie sier offentlig at han ikke er fan av internettsensasjonen Fred, noe som får Fred til å meddele at han skal slutte å legge ut filmer for alltid. Fansen blir rasende fordi Freddie har forårsaket slutten på de populære filmene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dobbelt opp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie sniker seg ut for å dra til en MMA-kamp, får de sine dobbeltgjengere til å lure Spencer til å tro at de fortsatt er hjemme. Imens bygger Spencer en kjempeversjon av Newton Balls.

programme.title: iCarly: Om hva for noe?
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie oppfordrer iCarly-fans til å stemme på David Archuleta i "Amerika Sings", syns de synd på nummer to og hjelper ham med å lage en musikkvideo.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skal gjøre Sam jentete
programme.desc: Da Sam innrømmer at hun liker en gutt på skolen, lærer Carly henne hvordan hun kan lokke ham til seg ved å oppføre seg mere feminint. Spencer er overbevist om at en jente liker ham pga. smokingen hans, så han går med den hele tiden.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 1
programme.desc: Når Carly dater er en tøffing, prøver hun å holde forholdet skjult for Spencer. Og Sam betaler Freddie for å lage en hjemmeside der hun kan legge ut alle sine ekle videofavoritter.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjenforening med Missy
programme.desc: Da Carlys gamle venninne Missy flytter tilbake til Seattle, tror Sam at Missy prøver å skifte henne ut som Carlys bestevenninne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg må ha skap 239
programme.desc: Når Sam og Freddie begge to vinner konkurransen for skolens beste skap, slir de nødt til å dele skap. Carly ber Spencer gi henne timer i billedkunst.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly utdelingen
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie holder en iCarly-galla for de beste bruker-bidragene i iCarly, og hyller pristagerne live på web-showet. Spencer verver europeiske badedraktmodeller for å hjelpe ham å lage premiestatuettene.

programme.title: iCarly: Tvillinger
programme.desc: Freddie prøver å bevise at Melanie, Sams tvillingesøster, er Sam i forkledning. Når Carly underviser Spencers nemesis, Chuck, prøver Spencer å overbevise henne om at Chuck er ond.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 2
programme.desc: Når Carly oppdager at hennes tøffe kjæreste Griffin samler på små Pee Wee Babies, må hun ta stilling til om hun holder ut å date en kar som har en kosedyrsamling. I mens forsøker Spencer å hjelpe Sam med å bli kvitt et mareritt.

programme.title: iCarly: iKamp mot Dingo
programme.desc: Dingo-kanalen har stjålet idéer fra iCarly, så Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer drar til Dingos Studio for å fortelle manusforfatterne hva de mener om det.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg tror de kysset
programme.desc: Da Sam kommer til å avsløre overfor Carly at hun og Freddie smugkysset, konfronterer Carly dem med hvorfor de ikke fortalte henne om det. Og Spencer underviser fanger i billedkunst i fengselet.

programme.title: iCarly: Kokkekamp
programme.desc: Når Carl, Sam og Freddie vinner over en berømt tv-kokk i en matlagningskonkurranse, vil ikke kokken lage mat mer og nekter å komme ut av soverommet sitt. Spencer prøver å oppfylle en fremtidsdrøm.

programme.title: iCarly: Rektor kampen
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie får rektor Franklin sparket, overtar miss Briggs og mr. Howard ledelsen og innfører strenge regler. Og Spencer leier en gammel rodeostjerne til å lære ham å ri på en mekanisk okse.

programme.title: iCarly: iSpeed Date
programme.desc: Så mange gutter dukker opp til 'ta Carly med på fest'-konkurransen, at Carly, Sam og Freddie må benytte speed-dating for å møte dem alle sammen. Spencer følger et merkelig treningsprogram fra en ny app.

programme.title: iCarly: Stjernehjelp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie skal lage en musikkvideo til en popstjernes comeback, oppdager de at popstjernen er ute av form og talentløs. Og Spencer oppdager at kvinnen han dater er Gibbys mor.

programme.title: iCarly: Livredderen
programme.desc: Når Freddie redder livet til Carly, forelsker Carly seg i ham. Sam og Spencer kjemper mot hverandre i et painball-spill som heter Assassin.

programme.title: iCarly: Lewberts tapte kjærlighet
programme.desc: Når gjengen oppdager at Lewbert engang var en lykkelig ung mann som var forlovet med en vakker kvinne, setter de seg fore å gjenforene det adskilte paret.

programme.title: iCarly: Missekonkurransen
programme.desc: Sam avslører overfor Carly og Freddie at hun deltok i skjønnhetskonkurranser som liten. Da hun finner ut at hennes rival skal konkurrere i Seattle, overbeviser hun Carly om å stille opp mot henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: Etter at Sam plutselig må i fengsel, lover Carly og Freddie dyrt og hellig å ikke avlyse nettshowet ettersom faren hennes skal se det. Carly ber Spencer om hjelp, men det blir vanskelig, for han skal på date.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: En eksentrisk millionær ber Carly og vennene hennes om å sende det første nettshowet fra det ytre rom, så de må prøves ut for en romreise. Imens besøker en merkelig liten pike Spencer hjemme i leiligheten.

programme.title: Totally Turtles
programme.desc: Cowabunga! Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles kommer rett fra kloakken og er klare til å kjempe mot både fremmede og mutante fiender. Ta en pizza og gjør deg klar for maksimal Turtle Power!
