programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Beignets, Blow Up Dolls and Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Jenny står i spissen for Vinny. Er det en fugl, et fly eller The Designation?
programme.sub-title: Beignets, Blow Up Dolls and Bridesmaids

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: P-WOWW
programme.desc: Angelinas utdrikningsfest er overtatt av gutta og begynner med strippeklubben og slutter med at Pauly og Jenny ligger i samme seng.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: So That Happened!
programme.desc: Nedtellingen til Angelinas bryllup begynner. Mike avanserer og Pauly D og Jenni ville natt får samboerne til å stille mange spørsmål.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Rewriting History
programme.desc: Angelinas bryllup er like rundt hjørnet så gjengen feirer henne med en tur til Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: You Had Me At Um, Hello!
programme.desc: Den store dagen er endelig her! Jenni føler seg forhekset, Angelina velsignet og Mike litt oransje.
programme.sub-title: You Had Me At Um, Hello!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Speech Part 1
programme.desc: Angelina og Chris gifter seg. Vinny protesterer og jentenes tale til bruden leder til buing i Staten Island-stil.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Speech Part 2
programme.desc: Angelinas bryllupsfest blir kaotisk når Deena, Jenni og Nicole holder tale. Jentene blir forskrekket, Angelina raser og guttene prøver å gjøre det godt igjen. Men skaden er kanskje allerede gjort.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Mediation
programme.desc: To dager etter Angelinas bryllup, er jentene helt på tuppa over talen som ble hørt verden rundt. Og Mike "The Situation" blir megler i håp om å føre familien sammen igjen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Taken Pauly
programme.desc: Midt oppi en global pandemi, fortsetter jentene med sosial distansering, men ikke på grunn av covid-19. Pauly er full av overraskelser når samboerne får vite at han ikke sitter i karantene alene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Double Book
programme.desc: Desperate tider krever desperate tiltak og gutta er klare for en familieferie. R, S, V og P har en sniken overraskelse for å få jentene sammen igjen, men Deena har en egen overraskelse som kan komplisere alt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Single Ronnie
programme.desc: Nedtellingen til Angelina kommer er i gang, og gutta må finne ut hvordan de skal presentere nyheten for Deena. Samtidig prøver gjengen å spille Kirsten giftekniv ved å lage et datingprogram til singel-Ronnie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Trouble Shot At Love
programme.desc: Datingprogram-ekspertene DJ Pauly D og Vinny Guadagnino er programledere. Seks jenter konkurrerer om den ultimate ungkarens kjærlighet, Ronnie Magro, i det splitter nye datingprogrammet "A trouble shot at love."

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jurrasic Angelina
programme.desc: Dobbeltbokingen blir full av følelser da Angelina slår ned i Las Vegas-sjøen. Deena blir på tuppa når hun kommer og Vinny dukker for slagene og The Situation blir overveldet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Text
programme.desc: 'The Situation' glemmer middagsplanene og deretter at han er i et tv-program. Og en sms hjemmefra ryster samboerne og truer med å blåse hele ferien i lufta.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Attack of the Killer Raccoons
programme.desc: Pauly kaver for å få Deena og Angelina ombord med en familiemiddag før Nikki kommer. Men en gjeng med vaskebjørner ødelegger nesten planen. Tilbake i Jersey, går Jenni glipp av noe viktig.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Somebody's Wifey's In Town
programme.desc: Pauly tar med Nikki på en familiemiddag, og gjengen holder pusten når Deena og Angelina havner ansikt til ansikt for første gang på ti måneder. Men Vinnys bryske kommentar om bryllupstale kan få alt til å spore av.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Return of JWOWW
programme.desc: Angelina og Deena har begravd stridsøksene, og familieferien kan offisielt begynne. Men da Jenni kommer endrer det alt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Note 2.0
programme.desc: JWOWW og Angelina setter p-en i pinlig under en familiemiddag. Etterpå er de i villrede, så Ronnie får en gjentjeneste av Dr. Drew. Kanskje han kan hjelpe til å forene familien igjen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Calling Dr. Drew
programme.desc: Dr. Drew megler i Angelina og Jennis konflikt. Og rotet er i ferd med å forverre seg da Deena oppdager at hennes private samtale med Mike ikke var så privat. Mike og Lauren får sine livs beste nyheter.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Wedding Redo
programme.desc: RSVP planlegger Angelinas bryllup igjen. Onkel Nino forretter og Vinny holder bryllupstalen. Hva kan gå galt?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Speech Pt. 3
programme.desc: Ti måneder etter at en brudepikes tale nesten ødela familien får Angelina bryllupet sitt. Mike prøver å holde på hemmeligheten til etter festen.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Two families of different faiths pull together for Matt and Sarah's wedding.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: In the pilot episode of the series, a reverend and his wife work to give each of their five children the support and freedom they need to face their challenges with love and sensitivity.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt befriends an unwed teenage mother-to-be and comes into suspicion for keeping her secret.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt is finally allowed back in the driver’s seat...until he backs into a police car.
programme.sub-title: In the Blink of an Eye

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: A loss is mourned and a baby is born, as the Camdens recover from the death of Annie's mother.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: When a church in a Black neighborhood is burned to the ground, the Camdens feel the fire of racism licking at their door.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy enters a haunted house and leaves with a new friend...the town boogieman!

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary's so embarrassed by her family's overly enthusiastic support in the stands, that she doesn't want them attend her basketball games.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric has been spotted at a downtown hotel with a beautiful woman and the whole town is talking.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: When Annie and Matt are held up at gunpoint, they're robbed of their money and their sense of security.
programme.sub-title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil, Speak No Evil

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Aunt Julie comes to visit for Thanksgiving and brings her drinking problem with her.
programme.sub-title: The Last Call for Aunt Julie

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt's new girlfriend seeks refuge from the divorce wars amongst his warm and loving family.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Plans for Lucy’s surprise birthday party backfire and Happy has puppies.
programme.sub-title: With a Little Help from My Friends

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: When Mary steals a glass, Matt takes the rap and gets busted.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric's desire to adopt a young runaway may create a permanent rift with his own father.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: When mom and dad go camping, the kids throw a party and quickly lose control.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: The school bully experiences a severe lapse in judgment when he tries to bully Mary.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Camille, a beautiful girl with a wild reputation, befriends Mary, and starts to influence her behavior.

programme.title: Dragon Lord
programme.desc: Jakten på kjærligheten og rampestrekene til Dragon og barndomsvennen Buller blir avbrytt når de hører at en gjeng begynner å smugle kinesiske nasjonal skatter utenlands. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: New Fist of Fury
programme.desc: En ung mand sætter sig for at hævne sin bedstefars død og bevise sit mesterskab i kampsport. Denne film vises uden undertekster.

programme.title: The Shaolin Plot
programme.desc: En brutal prins er fast bestemt på å samle alle kampsportmanualer. Etter å ha fått tak i alle unntatt to, finner han på en dristig plan for å få tak i de strengt bevoktede som befinner seg i Shaolin-tempelet. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Female Prisoner Scorpion: Jailhouse 41
programme.desc: Etter å ha tilbrakt et år i isolat rømmer Matsu fra fengselet sammen med seks andre fanger, forfulgt av vaktene under ledelse av den hevngjerrige fengselsdirektøren som ønsker henne død for enhver pris. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Dragon Lord
programme.desc: Jakten på kjærligheten og rampestrekene til Dragon og barndomsvennen Buller blir avbrytt når de hører at en gjeng begynner å smugle kinesiske nasjonal skatter utenlands. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Donatello, Rafael, Michelangelo og Leonardo er muterte, grønne ninja-skilpadder som elsker pizza og lever under New Yorks gateplan. Derifra tar de opp kampen mot den ondskapsfulle forbryteren Shredder og hans armé av svartkledde krigere.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III
programme.desc: Det hele begynner med en at en magisk spire transporterer deres gode venn April gjennom tid og rom, helt til samuraienes Japan. Leonardo og gjengen drar med en gang etter henne, og må nå beseire den onde Lord Naringa for å redde April.

programme.title: Shaolin Wooden Men
programme.desc: Etter å ha vært vitne til drapet på sin far, trener «Little Mute» i Shaolin-tempelet for å ta hevn, der han blir undervist av ulike lærere. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Chris wants to make dinner for John, who is totally against holidays.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake receives a letter and is shocked to find out that his late grandmother has left him $25,000.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Margaret tells John that a letter for a medical conference has arrived, but John scoffs, saying it's just an excuse for doctors to have a weekend in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris and Jake complain about the cold weather when John walks in, happy because it's cold and flu season, which means more patients.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake is looking for someone to go downtown and pick up Stevie Wonder concert tickets for him with no luck.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Chris fears that John is going to break up with her after he invites her to dinner at a nice restaurant with no explanation.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: An enraged and irascible Dr. John Becker (Ted Danson) enters the diner in his typical bad mood and sends the patrons fleeing.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker enters the diner to find Reggie in a rotten mood. After some prodding, she reveals that her ballplayer boyfriend just dumped her.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is bombarded by sexual overtones throughout the day, beginning with a sensual dream that is interrupted by a neighbor's blaring music.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker arrives at the diner to find Reggie and Jake discussing their plans to take a sculpting class.
programme.sub-title: Take These Pills And Shove' Em

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: While Becker is at the diner with Jake and Reggie, an odd little man named Bob enters.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: While railing on the evils of Beanie Babies, Becker gets annoyed when an overly friendly delivery guy named Todd stops by the diner.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker throws his back out at home while trying to close a stuck window.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has a fear that midgets bring him bad luck and is spooked by the new water guy, who happens to be vertically challenged.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker promises a friend that he will write a medical article for him, but gets frustrated with numerous distractions.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker learns that an elderly patient, Mr. Fowler, has suffered from a heart attack and calls his daughter to tell her the bad news.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker yells at a woman for letting her child cry uncontrollably, then rants about her bad parenting skills.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is outraged as he tells the gang at the diner that someone broke into his apartment and stole his computer.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker starts off the day in a cranky mood when he finds a stray cat in his office, which apparently crawled through a broken window.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker arrives at the office carrying the parking meter that ate his quarter.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker's patient, Jimmy, is a penniless scalper who is unable to afford his ulcer treatment.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: On Jake's way out to meet his girlfriend, Becker warns him that his zipper is down.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker (Ted Danson) performs his doctorly duties at the diner when a woman begins to choke on her food.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John tries to quit smoking and ends up exchanging one urge for another, sex.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Linda gets a Little Sister and learns a lesson about rebellion while John meddles in Reggies love life.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: We learn more about Linda's upbringing and gain insight into her world after a series of mishaps which led her to quit her job. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie chases a high school fantasy, by reuniting with a high school crush who ends up being a jerk.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has an extra ticket to Chicago and Reggie decides to go.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: A friend of and an old friend of Beckers is in town.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker gets shot and Frances Fisher guest stars as his doctor. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Frances Fisher guest stars again as Dr. Elizabeth Carson and reveals to Becker her attraction to him

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and Liz realize that they have a wacky relationship because they both snoop through each other's stuff and Bob wins and loses to lottery tickets.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: We find out how Jake becomes blind and watch him begin to come to terms with the accident, his friend, and himself. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker starts to appreciate life after spending an evening in the morgue identifying one of his patients.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker deals with chaos at work while Reggie studies for a test and Margaret attends the reading of a will. (TV-PG)

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Overlord
programme.desc: After a careful campaign of disinformation that throws the German defenders off-guard, the Western Allies finally land on Normandy.France is liberated.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Factories of Death
programme.desc: Året 1942 skal bli det mest betydningsfulle i "Den Endelige Løsningen", ettersom nazistene nå begynner å gjennomgå Vest-Europa og til og med tar jøder fra steder så fjernt som de britiske Kanaløyene.

programme.title: Secret War: The Aristocrat and the Balkan Communists
programme.desc: Fitzroy Maclean, an MP and WWII spy, supported Tito's Communist partisans in Yugoslavia against the Germans, forging a lasting friendship and honored at Tito's funeral post-war.
programme.sub-title: The Aristocrat and the Balkan Communists

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Belgian Collaborator
programme.desc: Leon Degrelle, a charismatic Belgian leader, joined the Nazis and led Die Wallonien on the Eastern Front. Despite no military background, he earned the Knight's Cross for valor. He recruited 4000 more for the SS, defending Berlin until April 1945.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: The Misfits Gather
programme.desc: Hitler finds his political destiny in post-war Munich. He quickly dominates a fringe party & builds it into the Nazi Party. He recruits infamous men to the cause including Herman Goering & Heinrich Himmler & they plot a coup known as the Beerhall Putsch.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: The Western Allies secure supply routes that will allow them to enter Germany, and the Ardennes counter-offensive fails. The Red Army advances rapidly. The SS implements the Holocaust.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Tanks have transformed warfare since their debut a century ago. Host Wil Willis traces their evolution from World War One breakthroughs to modern marvels like the M1 Abrams, the world's most powerful Main Battle Tank.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Could the mighty M2 be the greatest machine gun in history? Nicknamed “Ma Deuce”, this American machine gun has dominated battlefields for over 80 years. Host Wil Willis tests it and recreates Audie Murphy’s famous Medal of Honor moment.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: Japan continues its suicidal resistance, and invading it looks costly. After 2 atomic bombs, the Emperor intervenes and stops the War. Stalin grabs territory in East Asia. The War is over, and the Atomic Era and the Cold War start.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: France and Spain: The Pyrenees
programme.desc: Monty treks one of the toughest and most famous freedom trails out of Nazi controlled France, taking him through the valleys and high ridges of the Pyrenees mountains and into Spain.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Vidkun Quisling
programme.desc: Vidkun Quisling, once honored for diplomacy, turned traitor by collaborating with Nazis. His bid for power in Norway failed, relegated by Germans. Despite being named "fuehrer," his reign led to repression until his hanging post-Nazi defeat.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Devil's Due
programme.desc: During WWII, Greek Prime Ministers Tsolakoglou, Logothetopoulos, and Rallis collaborated with Nazi occupiers, imposing fees that caused a famine.

programme.title: Hitler's Mega Plane
programme.desc: In January 2012, Italian divers discovered the wreck of a massive plane off the coast of Sardinia. At a depth of 65 meters (213 feet) lies a Messerschmidt “Gigant”, the biggest aircraft in WWII.

programme.title: Secret War: The Dutch Disaster
programme.desc: Operation North Pole was a WWII German deception using captured SOE agents to mislead Britain. 47 of 50 agents were captured. Despite warnings, SOE ignored signs of compromise to maintain support, leading to a major intelligence failure.

programme.title: Secret War: The Mafia Connection
programme.desc: Lucky Luciano, a mafia boss of the 1930s, was in jail in 1942 on charges of running prostitution rings. US intelligence services did a deal with him and he got the Italians to share intelligence on German U boat movements.

programme.title: Hitler and I: Reflections on Evil
programme.desc: An in-depth, behind-the-scenes exploration of the making of the miniseries "Hitler: The Rise of Evil."

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Arajs Kommando
programme.desc: Viktor Arajs, a Latvian, played a significant role in the Holocaust, collaborating with the Nazis to eliminate Jews. Leading the Arajs Kommando, he orchestrated the killings of around 30,000 Jews. Arajs justified his actions as patriotic defense.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 4
programme.desc: The remaining 12 contestants receive makeovers at the Daniel Galvin salon and get their teeth whitened before being treated to a day out at a skating disco.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 5
programme.desc: The contestants go to the Hurlingham Academy and meet image consultant Vernon Francois for a challenge in which they decorate t-shirts and talk about their insecurities in a motivational speech for the school's students.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 6
programme.desc: The contestants shoot a mock commercial for Alcatel, where they pretend to talk to their lover over the phone with a script written in French.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 7
programme.desc: The contestants meet TV presenter Laura Whitmore for a posing challenge in Carnaby Street under the pouring rain while passersby vote on their favorite contestants.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 8
programme.desc: The remaining contestants take on a catwalk challenge for TRESemmé, walking on a plexiglass runway covered in water. Lisa is chosen as the best performer, winning a year’s worth of TRESemmé products and hair services at the Daniel Galvin salon.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 9
programme.desc: The contestants meet journalist Gordon Smart and participate in a press challenge where they write a 60-second skit regarding their opinions of the other contestants, which they later present in front of the camera.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 10
programme.desc: Letitia, Lisa, and Roxanne receive a second set of makeovers. The contestants meet with Elle at Hyde Park, where they learn that the remaining five contestants will be traveling to Canada for the remainder of the competition.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 11
programme.desc: The remaining five contestants fly to Toronto, where they take on the CN Tower's EdgeWalk before moving into their home at the SoHo Metropolitan Hotel.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 12
programme.desc: Star of The Hills and America's Next Top Model judge Kelly Cutrone gives the contenders a grilling in Toronto ahead of next week's final.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 13
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson and the judges join the three finalists on a Toronto beach for a tribal-themed shoot. The remaining two then take part in a fashion show where one of the girls is crowned the winner.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 1
programme.desc: Dannii Minogue joins host Elle Macpherson and Tyson Beckford as 28 hopefuls begin their battle for a modelling contract with a leading agency. The girls pull out all the stops but only half of them will survive the cull.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 2
programme.desc: The contestants head to the National Wedding Show at Birmingham's NEC to be coached in the art of the catwalk by model Jade Parfitt.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 3
programme.desc: It's time for the contestants to receive their makeovers and host Elle Macpherson embraces the challenge by opting for a new look herself. After their transformations, the girls pose like professional gymnasts with Olympian Louis Smith.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 4
programme.desc: Chemistry with the camera is imperative for a top model, so to separate the sizzlers from the fizzlers, the girls must pose with male models.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 5
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson shares her top tips in a modelling workshop before Tyson challenges the girls to shine on a shoot in an ex-coal mine.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 6
programme.desc: The final ten sample the flamboyant world of high fashion in a catwalk show with unusual accessories, before bearing all for a nude shoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 7
programme.desc: The contestants demonstrate their acting skills in milk commercials before taking part in a photoshoot inspired by classic children's stories.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Andi hires a pretty, young babysitter, Sophia (Victoria Justice), to watch the kids, and gets jealous when her daughter, Kate, goes to her instead for advice.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam discovers that the pastor he hired for their wedding was a phony and he and Andi aren't really married, he scrambles to find a way to fix it before she finds out.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam needs to hire a new project manager, Andi accuses Adam of unconscious bias after he only interviews men for the job.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam notices his Dad's increasingly forgetful behavior, he struggles with how to approach him to discuss it.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When the kids won't do their chores, Adam and Andi decide to go on strike too.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam thinks Kate's boyfriend, Tyler (Griffin Gluck), is a pothead, he decides to confront Tyler but doesn't get the support he expects from Andi.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam takes his kids to work with him for the day, they accidentally give his biggest client lice. Also, Andi feels like a bad mom when she's the only one in the family not to get lice.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi agree on a present-free Valentine's Day, Adam gives the gift he planned for Andi to his mother instead.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi try to get back in their neighbors' good graces after no one shows up to their potluck.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi are caught off guard by unexpected expenses, they each decide to give up a luxury to pay them off.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi gets Bev (Swoosie Kurtz) a spot volunteering at the hospital, Joe becomes bored and starts spending too much time with Adam.
programme.sub-title: Guess Who's Coming to Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi and Adam disagree about Kate attending a dance with an older boy, Adam tries to outsmart Andi to win the argument.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam attempts to organize a birthday dinner for Andi and he discovers that managing guests isn't easy.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi lose footage of an intimate moment they accidentally recorded, they have to track it down before anyone can see it.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi's folks decide to visit them for Easter, Adam and Andi have to keep the peace between both sets of parents.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam insists that pranks are harmless fun, Andi creates an elaborate hoax to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam is determined to figure out what Andi's hiding when he discovers she's been keeping secrets from him for his own good.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam is thrilled and honored to help Joe buy a new car but is caught off guard when Joe suddenly becomes irritable, and the negotiations go off track.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Don realize they need to bring in more business, they film a commercial advertising their company.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi set up Adam's boss on a date to boost her spirits in the hope that she'll then be in the mood to have Adam resume work on the mini-mall.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Andi proposes an exciting idea for Adam and her to go into business together when she isn't able to find work. Also, Adam tackles the most challenging job of his life - renovating Joe and Bev's (Swoosie Kurtz) kitchen.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam attempts to make the office feel more inviting since Andi will be joining him at work every day; Lowell hides a life-changing secret.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The legendary chef of Italian cuisine Hiromi Yamada takes on Iron Chef Chen in a culinary collision of cabbage.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Sakai goes up against the first sushi chef to appear on 'Iron Chef,' Hiromi Funatsu.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Masatoshi Kimura, specializing in hot-flame Chinese cuisine, takes on Iron Chef Sakai.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Kiyoshi Takahashi who won bronze in the World Chinese Cooking Contest goes up against Iron Chef Chen who won silver in an all-out grudge match.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: It's Iron Chef Michiba vs. Challenger Kuniyuki Ishikawa in a high-level battle of two master chefs in Japanese cuisine. The ingredient, natto, is made from fermented soybeans.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Acclaimed chef Kandagawa brings on his top apprentice, Katsumi Hanato, to challenge Iron Chef Michiba in the battle of ayu.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Yuji Wakiya, a young chef out to revolutionize Chinese cuisine, goes head-to-head against Iron Chef Sakai in the battle of sea urchin.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Masahiko Miyamoto, a challenger who has worked in one of France's leading three-star restaurants, takes on Iron Chef Chen in the battle of milk.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Koichi Tabata, a wandering chef who has worked in over 200 restaurants in Japan, challenges Iron Chef Chen in the battle of eggplant.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Michiba is challenged to a battle of tuna by Takasehi Mera who uses the longest knife in Japan.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Tadaaki Shimizu, the first-ever Japanese sous-chef of the famous Tour d'Argent, challenges Iron Chef Sakai in the battle of homard.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: It's a team matchup between the Iron Chefs Mihciba and Chen and two of Paul Bocuse's favorite apprentices, Joel Bruant and Masashi Furutaka, in this battle of sea bass.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Sakai takes on Mitsuru Saito in an all-out battle of beef.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Kandagawa, Iron Chefs' nemesis, sends out his lethal weapon Yasuhiko Yoshida to challenge Iron Chef Michiba in a wriggling battle of eel.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Hisohisa Koyama, an up-and-coming maestro of Japanese cuisine, challenges Iron Chef Sakai in the battle of pike conger.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Morimoto’s debut as an Iron Chef brings a difficult challenger: Yukio Hirayama.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Kobe and Mario Frittoli, who both learned from masters of Italian cuisine, will face off in this battle of broccoli.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Morimoto engages Challenger Masayoshi Kimura in this battle of rice.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chef Sakai, known as the Iron Chef French, will have his hands full in this battle specially designed around Wedgwood china.

programme.desc: The challenger is a master chef hailing from Kyoto. He has the support of the former Iron Chef Michiba and Dr. Yatori. Can the Iron Chef win this battle?

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are looking at a custom LS3 motor . The 1960 Corvette is getting work done on its brake pads.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Taming a 1971 Challenger R/T
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: When Ovide purchased his 1957 Bel Air sight unseen, the car was a rusted piece of junk so it’s on Dan to figure out how to restore this classic. Dino loves to go fast. His 1969 Super Bee is anything but super. Dan is tasked to feed Dino’s need for speed.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Jay brings Dan a 2012 Camaro ZL1 with poor performance and a blown supercharger. Terry wants Dan to complete a high-powered restomod of a 1931 Landau Phaeton, but the car arrives with mismatched parts and an engine that should have stayed in the junkyard.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Dan agrees to fix a 1947 Mack Firetruck that take FantomWorks into wet and uncharted territory. Ken’s 1971 Malibu Chevelle arrives as a garage ornament that hasn't run in five years, so it’s up to FantomWorks to bring this family heirloom back to life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Scott’s 1953 Fleetwood is a monumental challenge that takes a turn to the crazy when Dan has to add rare features that the car never had in the first place. John wants FantomWorks to make his 1967 Mercury Cougar roaring more fiercely than ever.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are putting the frame on the body of the 1964 Corvette Restomod. After they have the body put together they work on putting the door hinges on.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are fighting off the Texas summer heat. Vinnie and the team are working to bless a veteran with this restoration project.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: George wants his 1967 Chevelle to be perfect, but his car has had more rats than repairs and the engine bay is too small for his dreams. Brian’s 1960 Lincoln is full of surprises, and he moment something else is fixed, a new problem surfaces.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: General Lee Considered
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Chris asks FantomWorks to breathe new life into a 1951 Mercury Woody that was sitting in a chicken coop for thirty years. Dan’s 1970 Mustang Boss arrives with a long list of problems and the speed of a sea slug.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: A 1983 Avanti shows up with $58,000 worth of mismatched parts and an escalating cascade of hidden problems. A 3100 Chevy Pick-up rolls in with rope holding the doors shut, but the team soon learns that this is the tip of a very ugly iceberg.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: From Roadrunner to Superbird

programme.desc: A young man learns that the girl he's in love with is pregnant.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A lonely spy-story writer buys her murdered hero's sports car, which comes complete with his ghost.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A cold-hearted businessman is given the opportunity to relive the last week of his life. And he tries to do the right thing this time.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A runaway dog unites a boy in an orphanage with its human family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The orphan boy has formed an attachment to the dog, although he is going away to living with a new foster family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A trainer is reminded of his own shady past when a fighter he's been mentoring is asked to take a fall.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark must help a doctor confront a secret he's kept from everyone, including his own family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan casts a retired comic and his movie-star son in a play about a father and son who never got to know each other.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A youngster turns to a fantasy world and a comic-book superhero to cope with the pain of his father's death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark take on a system that keeps inmate mothers and their children apart.

programme.desc: The patriarch of a ranch family feels he's too old to rein in some wild horses.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A cop is working undercover at a school to put an end to drug use but faces suspension because of a mistake Mark has made.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: At Christmastime, Jonathan and Mark try to get a divorced couple to work together for their son's sake. Meanwhile, the holiday may be in jeopardy when a department store Santa is arrested.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Four brothers go on the run to escape a court order that would split them up.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A country doctor refuses to slow down and seems to be working himself to death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A district attorney clashes with a lawyer who agrees to defend a friend charged with stealing.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Five gunmen individually hired to kill Marshal Matt Dillon converge on Dodge City.

programme.desc: Strother Martin guest stars as Ben Snow, a half-crazed desert hermit who saves Festus' life only to force him to become a human pack animal.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A widow's ranch is requisitioned by the Union Army, making her the target of Confederate cavalrymen.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: In Apache country, a missionary engages in a philosophic battle with an escaped murderer.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Vultures
programme.desc: Two bounty hunters arrive in the Dodge City area looking for a wanted man. They shoot him for a $1000 reward. Earp agrees to get their money but wants them out of town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Plagued by gold thefts, Denver bankers set up their own mint in the bank basement.
programme.sub-title: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Unable to come to terms, a U.S. senator and a Supreme Court justice agree to a duel.
programme.sub-title: A Gun Is Not a Gentleman

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Wells Fargo stage driver Charlie Parkhurst wins fame for his daring endeavors.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: In part two, A young outlaw is reformed by the kindness and help of an elderly female junk collector.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Jeb Slade talks his brother Billy into helping him rob Aaron Winters, who is wealthy from his borax findings.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Buff McCloud runs a Nevada town with an iron fist — until a stranger arrives.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt's Decision
programme.desc: Earp decides to leave Tombstone but learns the Clantons are gunning for him. Nellie Cashman and Dick Gird want Earp to stay to bring law and order to Tombstone.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An embittered ranch woman holds Matt Dillon and Kitty prisoner while plotting Matt's execution to avenge her husband's hanging.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Just Before the Battle
programme.desc: A stagecoach holdup orchestrated by Johnny Ringo and Curly Bill gives Wyatt Earp the opportunity he's been waiting for--a chance to get the rival factions to turn on each other.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Hunt the Man Down
programme.desc: Earp is forced with the help of Mr. Cousin to go into the rough Bushwhacker area to track down a man wanted for murder.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: An attorney takes the case of a famed gunman who is charged with murder.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: One-Man Army
programme.desc: Texan Drum Denman goes after northerner Earp by backing a free newspaper to print false stories about Earp trying to draw him out of Dodge City.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Lt. Robert Benson becomes torn when the woman he loves asks him to give out secret government information.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: A Good Man
programme.desc: A reformed gambler Tittle comes to Dodge City preaching against gambling and the devil. Earp is forced to intervene when Tittle preaches in a popular saloon.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: On one drunken evening, a miner gives a pretty saloon singer half-interest in his apparently worthless claim.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Winfield Stratton finds gold just after selling his mining claim to a syndicate.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Time for All Good Men
programme.desc: The owner of the Big T Rance Purcell and his foreman Gus Andrews trap Earp alone at Stony Wells. Earp outnumbered 30 to 1 is running out of water and ammo.
programme.sub-title: The Time for All Good Men

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A crafty rancher tries to frame his wife with a hired hand in a plot to force money from her father.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Two bronco busters risk their lives to raise money for a ranch in Montana, only to have the dream ruined by a wild stallion.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A man seeking to open a saloon turns to Harry Bassett, Wyatt Earp and Bat Masterson for help.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Suspicious townspeople are drawn toward two brothers who spend their nights digging at a grave.

programme.title: Harlequin: Treacherous Beauties
programme.desc: Anne mistenker at broren Alans død ikke var en ulykke. Hun begynner å jobbe for en familie som kan ha hatt en finger med i spillet, men blir snart forelsket i den eldste sønn. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Broken Lullaby
programme.desc: En foreldreløs jentes (Mel Harris) jakt etter fortiden begynner med et barndomsbilde av henne selv ved siden av en sjelden spilledåse, og fører henne til en lokkende skattejeger. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: At the Midnight Hour
programme.desc: En vakker barnepike(Liz) fanger oppmerksomheten Richard, en enkemann og vitenskapsmann, og hans begavede sønn Andy. Liz' liv blir truet når hun kommer for nær sannheten om hvem som drepte den tidligere hans frue. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: The Awakening
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter who's tracking one of her tenants convinces Sara McAllister to team up with him, they start an adventure into the dangerous world of international espionage and love.

programme.title: Harlequin: This Matter of Marriage
programme.desc: Arkitektene Hallie og Donnalee arbeider med et stort byggeprosjekt for en eksentrisk milliardær, Adam Barr. Hallieshar lett etter drømmemannen, finner ham plutselig rett ved siden av. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Hard to Forget
programme.desc: Privatdetektiv Max etterforsker Sandra Applewhites død og er overbevist om at hennes ektemann John Gilman drepte henne. Når han møter Sandras tvillingsøster Nicky, ber han henne om hjelp til å avsløre Gilman. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Diamond Girl
programme.desc: Playboy-advokaten Denny ser aldri på sin kjedelige og lojale assistent Claire Bernard. Men når han oppdager at Claire er en uslipt diamant, bestemmer han seg for å forvandle henne til en fortryllende skjønnhet. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Sarah og Amy er bestevenner for livet og nå arrangerer de sin første kunstutstilling i en liten by i New England. Når en mystisk fremmed dukker opp, starter et mysterium med narkotika, CIA og Sarahs elskede onkel. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Loving Evangeline
programme.desc: Robert får vite om sin brors dødelige båtulykke som får han til å dra for å hente liket. Der møter han Evie Shaw som er eieren av marinaen. Han blir besatt av sin brors mistenkelige død... og av Evie. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Recipe for Revenge
programme.desc: Caterer Carly Westin agrees to prepare a feast for a friend who wants to impress a man. But the couple is killed when she is in the kitchen. When police investigator Jack Brannigan gets involved, he must protect Carly before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood på folk som hviler i 'Liggende nedslag', blir frekke med eldre damer med sølvtunge i 'Bestemorsnert' og opplever fallskjermhoppere i trøbbel som gjør 'Tvilsomme hopp'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood å beskytte juvelene fra Penisslag', går fra dekk til dekk i 'Fra båt til båt' og blir blokkert i høytflyvende svev av 'Hopphinder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood fra stor høyde med folk som er 'Tyngdelovsikre', feirer romansen med 'Merkelig kjærlighetsspråk' og raser mot katastrofen i 'For raskt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' hopper Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood på sykkelen, men glemmer å holde 'Hendene på styret', finner belter til noen 'Bukseløse idrettsutøvere' og spiser lunsj på nifse restauranter med 'Frykt på menyen'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood høyhastighetsmoro i 'Snøet og tauet', opplever at elsparkesykling bør skje om dagen i 'Nattlig sparkesykling' og ser at du får en viss livsinnsikt når du har 'Lært av erfaring'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kaster Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood seg ut i skiløypene med litt 'Snøhjuling', utfordrer fedre i 'Fikser det ikke lenger' og blir gjennomvåte av 'Tristhetens bølger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hardt på isen i 'Frostbitere', klarer ikke å mestre hjulet med 'Hamstermenn' og får seg en humpete hjemtur i 'Ingen fyllekjøring i dag'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood besøk av komikerlegenden Pauly Shore og stiller tøffe spørsmål i 'Pauly går i dybden', ranes av fulle folk i 'Svekkede tyver' og får folk bort fra Vegas i 'Tilbake til Paulywood'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' mister Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ølen sin i noen 'Elendige båtkast', opplever folk som ikke klarer å skjule egne følelser i 'Null pokerfjes' og ser på skadene når ting er blitt 'Fyrverket'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood våte og ville i 'Vannsklie-kollisjoner', lærer å holde munn etter en 'Gudssmell på kjeften' og blir kastet av hesteryggen i 'Hestedropp'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kjører Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood terrengsykkel i 'Offroad-krasj', gjør ville triks på basketballbanen i 'Slurvete triksskudd' og opplever de to verste ordene i det engelske språket i 'Slangeoverraskelse'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på 'Farlige toaletter', spiller noen 'Kattepuss' og drar på 'Fuktige bilturer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood imot Yung Gravy og blir vitner til at cowboyer går i bakken i 'Landsens behandling', oppdager at scener er farlige i 'Danserfall' og møter noen heite eldre damer i 'Gravy-babes'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah seg en tur med 'Bæsjesteg', sjekker ut 'Fulle fall' og tester 'Kunstig Uintelligens'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah at varehus er farlige i 'Lagerskadet', blir terrorisert av kalkuner i 'Kalkunkrek' og møter folk som sier alt med ett blikk i 'Tause talere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Kristy Sarah stoppet på sin vei i 'Beinlåst', gisper av djevelske søsken i 'Skrudde søstre' og rydder veien på grunn av noen 'Veldig vinglete tankbiler'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah for opphisset til å sette seg og blir 'Stolhemmet', får igjen av noen dyr i 'Vill karma' og slår ned alle kjeglene i 'Strike med stil'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah plutselig ned i 'Overraskende spagat', opplever gjengjeldelse for puss i 'Prankslått' og kløner med kjærligheten i 'Datekatastrofer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' klarer ikke Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah å stå ned løypa i ett stykke i 'Snøbrettoverfall', blir grillet av unger i 'Uskyldige fornærmelser' og bryr seg ikke om skitt i 'Basillelskere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah på teite førere i 'Bakhjulsduster', finner ut at hunder ikke alltid er menneskets beste venn i 'Slemme gutter' og er vitne til farene ved å drikke seg til mot i 'Fyllemodig'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjør Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood litt beruset vektløfting med 'Kraftfulle folk', mister taket på greenen i 'Luftkøller' og oppdager de morsomme håndfaste konsekvensene ved å 'Berøre fremmede'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood måter å bruke båten sin på islagt innsjø i 'Snøbåtkjøring', møter folk som trenger belte i 'Buksefall' og får seg noen rare overraskelser i 'Underlige opplevelser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Kristy Sarah føle smerten ved 'Harde besvimelser', oppdager at etter en fest trenger du mat i 'Fulten' og innser at noen fiser sniker seg innpå deg i 'Overraskende tuting'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' heier Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood på 'Sølvgrå skatere', tar en titt på hvem som sitter fast i 'Opp ned-fælt' og ser noen videoer lagt opp av folk som 'Burde slettet den'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood å beskytte seg selv, men blir likevel overkjørt i 'Forsvarskatastrofer', løper i dekning for å unngå 'Luftangrep' og klarer ikke å treffe målet i 'Svinger og misser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' henter Rob, Steelo, og Lolo Wood papirlommetørklær og plaster mot sine 'Nyseattakk', møter noen småunger som fortsetter å vise 'Rakkerraseri' og tar seg god tid til å treffe bakken i 'Lange fall'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo, og Lolo Wood på seg leggskinnene og blir 'Barnefotballrystet', vil heller bli hjemme i 'Neppe festpersoner' og bryter alle toalettregler i 'Pissoarvillmenn'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo, og Lolo Wood imot Travis Mills og Rahne Jones, stjernene i MTVs "Help! I'm in a Secret Relationship!" og konfronterer 'Altfor offentlige forhold' og er utro mot feil person i 'Knust av eksen'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' åpner Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood døra for noen 'Tøffe hjemkomster', handler inn til morsomme tider med 'Festvogner' og prøver å holde tritt med moroflykterne i 'Storslagne flukter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tipper Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood over folk i 'Topptung', blir 'Slått åndeløs' og finner golfbanen i 'Range-rikosjetter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo, og Lolo Wood forbløffet over 'Matmagikere', ordner opp i 'Bilutslipp' og slår hardt ut fra plata og får kjenne litt på 'Pitcherpine'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo, og Lolo Wood vondt når de faller på baken i 'Haletrauma', møter noen unge bryllupsgjester som er 'Små bryllupskrasjere' og fester med folk som 'Danser for snuskete'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood rett inn i nettingdører med 'Usynlig netting', finner unike metoder for å 'Klare varmen' og tar den lange veien ned med 'Sakteskliing'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' må Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood forholde seg til smerten når de 'Møter veggen', blir sår istedenfor stor med 'Hjemme-pullup-problemer' og holder stand i den offentlige do-ruletten i 'Båsoverraskelser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' spiller Rob, Steelo, og Lolo Wood pool-basketball i 'For våt til å dunke', trenger én million servietter i 'Grisefjes' og forårsaker alvorlige vannskader som 'Rørkløner'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' hovner Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood opp sammen med noen smertefulle 'Tåstukere', holder seg i egen bane ved siden av 'Bowlingramp' og sjekker bilforsikringsdekningen i 'Trerelatert ødeleggelse'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo, og Lolo Wood seg en glatt spasertur i 'Vintershuffle', tar seg en tur innom banene sammen med folk med 'Briljant bowlingenergi' og blir våte og skader seg med 'Dårlige bassengsprett'.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Etter på merkelig vis å ha blitt følsom for lys, bruker Allison et par solbriller som viser merkelige tall som kan være relatert til folks forventede levealder.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons visjoner blir en viktig informasjonskilde for myndighetene når prøvene av en dødelig sykdom forsvinner. I mellomtiden tror Scanlon at han er klar til å fri til Lynn.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Hovedmistenkte i en drapssak dør, og politiet er overbevist om at han var skyldig. Men når den døde mannen kontakter Allison, sier han at han er uskyldig og at han vil hjelpe henne med å finne morderen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når årsdagen for Devalos' datters død nærmer seg, blir Devalos hjemsøkt av minnene fra den traumatiske hendelsen, og Allison drømmer om hvor langt Devalos gikk for å sette datterens morder i fengsel.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer om et schizofrent barn, men når hun møter henne i det virkelige liv, virker hun helt normal - men hun har en psykisk syk romkamerat.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison ser hele tiden ansiktet til en mann i ansiktene til andre mennesker, inkludert Joe, og må finne ut hvorfor. I mellomtiden har Ariel problemer med å sitte barnevakt for en rampete gutt.
programme.sub-title: Will the Real Fred Rovick Please Stand Up?

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison melder seg på selvforsvarskurs. I mellomtiden jobber Devalos med en tenårings voldtektssak, i tillegg til å undersøke et mistenkt mord som involverer en politimann.
programme.sub-title: How to Beat a Bad Guy

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Vi ser tilbake på Allison og Joes bryllup, og hvordan den økende styrken til Allisons "krefter" påvirket det snart gifte paret.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison og døtrene hennes har den samme drømmen om en merkelig jente som kan være knyttet til en rekke mord. I mellomtiden har Joe en ny konflikt med sjefen.
programme.sub-title: There Will Be Blood... Type A

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison oppdager at den merkelige jenta fra hennes og døtrenes drømmer er seriemorderens neste mål, og hun må beskytte jenta mot fare samtidig som hun prøver å samarbeide med henne for å fange morderen.
programme.sub-title: There Will Be Blood... Type B

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison installerer en høyteknologisk talende tyverialarm etter at en nabo blir myrdet, som hun senere oppdager kan kommunisere med Marie.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: En fortvilet Ariel begynner å miste timer og senere år av livet sitt og må se på sitt fremtidige jeg for å finne ut hvordan hun kan komme tilbake til nåtiden.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons vennskap med en gris kan lede til hvor en savnet dyrerettighetsaktivist befinner seg. I mellomtiden får Joe en spesiell bursdagsgave fra Marie.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons hjernesvulst kommer tilbake, noe som kan vise seg å få store konsekvenser for ikke bare henne, men også hennes nærmeste.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når Allison og Bridgette har den samme drømmen, bytter de personlighet, noe som skaper kaos for dem begge.
programme.sub-title: Bring Your Daughter to Work Day

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison begynner å se svevende symboler over folks hoder, tegn hun tror kan matche folk med partneren deres.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Scanlons hjemsøkende drømmer om sin avdøde bror får Allison til å bekymre seg for partneren sin.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison fortsetter å havne i konflikt med Scanlon når hun tror at hans avdøde bror kan være knyttet til drapet på en savnet jente.
programme.sub-title: How to Kill a Good Guy

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Etter å ha fått en hudtransplantasjon på hånden, blir Allison forvirret når den samme hånden begynner å bevege seg med en egen vilje.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Michaela returns to Boston to visit her ailing mother, Sully must act before he loses her.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A severe drought threatens -- and divides -- Colorado Springs at Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike suspects that Dorothy is spending time with Sully, and Becky thinks Colleen stole her boyfriend.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The children hide a wounded Sully from the cavalry, which has put a bounty on his head.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike sees Christmas past, present and future with the help of a beloved friend.
programme.sub-title: A Christmas Tale - Dr. Mike's Dream

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Matthew is trapped in a mine cave and Sully is his only hope for rescue.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A typhus epidemic spreads at Black Kettle's camp, and Dr. Mike feels responsible.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The Circus comes to town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Another woman comes between Sully and Dr. Mike.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Dr. Mike helps the reverend find parents for orphaned children, he gets ideas about marrying her.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sully and Dr. Mike take desperate action as the battle between the Buffalo Soldiers and The Dog Soldiers escalates.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Matthew becomes addicted to gambling.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dorothy's charming son, a war hero, comes home with a war injury and a shameful secret -- a drug addiction.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A Denver banker returns to town and brings the Ku Klux Klan with him.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The new school teacher may be guilty of child abuse.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela is kidnapped by the dog soldiers, and Sully vows to find her before she is killed.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela is kidnapped by the dog soldiers, and Sully vows to find her before she is killed.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Jake runs for mayor against a surprising candidate--Dr. Quinn.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Fragment
programme.desc: Claudia legges inn på sykehus etter skytehendelsen. Krystle dras inn i saken. Logan Rhinewood fortsetter å kjøpe opp Devner-Carrington. Cecil frir til Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Shakedown
programme.desc: Claudia er fortsatt forvirret etter ulykken. Jeff oppfordrer Fallon til å skvære opp. Steven blir utpresset av en ung omstreifer.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Two Princes
programme.desc: Steven blir arrestert. Alexis og Cecil planlegger å gifte seg. Fallon gjør det slutt med Nick. Claudia tror at Fallons baby er hennes avdøde datter, Lindsay.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Cliff
programme.desc: Oljemannen Farouk fra Midtøsten vil hevne seg på Blake og forteller Nick at Carrington er ansvarlig for brorens død.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Plea
programme.desc: Krystle finner Blake på fjellet og får ham på sykehuset. Nick Toscanni forsvinner. Cecil blir også brakt til sykehuset, og han er veldig dårlig. En politietterforskning settes i gang for å finne babyen.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Roof
programme.desc: Michael drar til Denver for å finne ut hvem han er. Alexis og Cecil planlegger bryllup på sykehuset. Claudia forsvinner, og Blake mistenker at hun har kidnappet babyen.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Wedding
programme.desc: Babyen reddes fra den egentlige kidnapperen, Alfred Grimes, som viser seg å være faren til Roger Grimes. Fallon gir Susan sparken. Claudia drar på sanatorium. Fallon begynner å lete etter en jobb.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Will
programme.desc: Cecil etterlater eiendommen og Colbyco til Jeff og Alexis. Han avslører også sitt «Rhinewood»-spill for Blake når testamentet leses opp. Blake mistenker Alexis for å være innblandet.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Siblings
programme.desc: Alexis gir sønnen Adam, som hun ikke har sett på årevis, en jobb i Colbyco. Blake begynner å tro at Adam kan være sønnen hans.

programme.title: Dynasty: Mark
programme.desc: Blake prøver å bli venner med Adam, men Adam avviser ham. Alexis forteller Mark at han fortsatt er gift med Krystle. Mark prøver å få jobb som tennistrener på Fallons hotell.

programme.title: Dynasty: Kirby
programme.desc: Josephs datter, Kirby, kommer for å bo hos familien Carrington etter å ha brutt forlovelsen i Frankrike. Joseph prøver å overtale henne til å gå tilbake til forloveden. Mark får jobben på Fallons hotell.

programme.title: Dynasty: La Mirage
programme.desc: Fallon får et brev fra Steven, og det viser seg at han er på en oljerigg i Javasjøen i Indonesia. Adam blander giftstoffet i malingen til Jeffs nye kontor.

programme.title: Dynasty: Acapulco
programme.desc: Jeff begynner å bli svimmel og dårlig av den giftige malingen Adam brukte på kontoret. Joseph ber Kirby holde seg unna Jeff.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Locket
programme.desc: Carrington-familien får høre at Stevens oljerigg har eksplodert. Blake drar for å lete etter ham, sammen med en ubuden Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Search
programme.desc: Alexis og Blake fortsetter letingen etter Steven i Indonesia, men finner bevis for at Steven kan være død. Blake nekter å tro det og hyrer en synsk person, Jason Denner, for å få hjelp.

programme.title: Dynasty: Samantha
programme.desc: Blake fortsetter sin febrilske leting etter Steven i Denver ved hjelp av synske Jason Denner. Blake nekter å tro at sønnen er død, og Krystle er bekymret over den ustabile oppførselen hans.

programme.title: Dynasty: Danny
programme.desc: En åpenbart syk Jeff er forvirret. Sammy Jo kunngjør at hun skal til New York for å gjøre det stort som modell, og at hun ikke lenger vil beholde sønnen, Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty: Madness
programme.desc: Jeffs humør blir stadig mer ustabilt. Adam prøver å trekke Jeff inn i skandalen med Cecil Colby/Logan Rhinewood.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Det slår gnister når sjalusi og konkurranse tilspisser seg. Et par tar forbindelsen til et nytt nivå, mens tvilens skjær sprer seg over det andre. Før en dramatisk vri på avfallsplassen.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: To datere kjemper om kompensere for balansen i huset etter sjokket over avfallsplassen. En maskeradefest genererer en sæskilt nakenglede, og for mye tungebevegelser presser et par til bristegrensen.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Et par settes på den ytterste prøven da nok en nybegynner kommer. De uten sterke forbindelser føler seg også sårbare.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Fjærene blir rufset til i en ny kamp om jentene. Dom og Mike fortsetter videre. Og en fest sendt fra himmelen, ender i en helvetes overraskelse.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: To kjente fjes vil absolutt gjenopprette forbindelsene, men er de i stand til å fortsette der de slapp? Daterne skjemmes bort i en dampende, bakvendt striptease. Dette styrker visse, svekker andre og genererer en havarert forbindelse.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Ti singler kler av seg i kjærlighetens navn, og kaster seg inn i en vågal datingerfaring. Nakne begynner de å bli kjent, før forbindelsene settes på prøve.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Den første nakne nybegynneren truer umiddelbart forbindelsene. Mens visse forbindelser vokser, tviles det på andre, noe som skaper spenning før en dater dumpes permanent.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Daterne søker stadig forbindelser etter den første dumpingen. Det er fritt fram for nye forbindelser da andre brytes. En omgang 'Dare or Bare' gjør at en dater angrer mens tiden tikker for ei av jentene.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Not aware that he has become a werewolf, Scott (Tyler Posey) must deal with hunters trying to catch him, another werewolf (Tyler Hoechlin) and the pressures of normal teen life, all while trying to get a second date with Allison (Crystal Reed).

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott's (Tyler Posey) first date with Allison (Crystal Reed) ends up in confusion and turns into a dreaded "group date." Meanwhile, a mystery animal attack has Sheriff Stilinski (Linden Ashby) and the rest of Beacon Hills on the lookout.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With his life in danger, Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) is forced to make reluctant allies out of Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien). While Scott tries to survive dinner with Allison's father (JR Bourne), Stiles attempts to keep Derek alive.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: A new animal attack raises more questions among authorities. And when Scott (Tyler Posey) and Allison (Crystal Reed) skip school unannounced, Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) must deal with the ever more aggressive werewolf hunters on his own.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) come up with ways for Scott to control the transformation in order to be with Allison (Crystal Reed), while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) attempts to make an ally of Scott in his battle with the hunters.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: When Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) is savagely attacked by the Alpha, Scott (Tyler Posey), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) and their friends find themselves trapped in Beacon Hills High School at night where they face both questions and suspicions about each other.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) on the run from Sheriff Stilinski (Linden Ashby), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) must help Scott (Tyler Posey) face his second full moon. Meanwhile, Jackson (Colton Haynes) tries to get closer to Allison (Crystal Reed).

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Clues, including a prior encounter with Derek (Tyler Hoechlin), bring Jackson (Colton Haynes) to a dangerous revelation about Scott (Tyler Posey)…and his actions begin to threaten not only Scott's life, but his own as well.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With startling revelations weighing in on him, Scott (Tyler Posey) finds himself scrambling to protect the people he loves, including Allison (Crystal Reed) who begins to follow clues left by her Aunt Kate about her family history.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: While struggling with family secrets, Allison (Crystal Reed) focuses on the Winter Formal dance. Meanwhile, as the tensions between werewolves and hunters rise to a boiling point, Scott (Tyler Posey) struggles to protect both friends and enemies.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: In the season finale, Scott McCall (Tyler Posey) discovers one last clue which allows him to enlist both friends -- and even a previous enemy -- in order to stop the mysterious killings and win back Allison (Crystal Reed), the girl he loves.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: When Lydia (Holland Roden) goes missing from the hospital, werewolves and hunters alike begin a search to discover not only where she is, but what she may have become. Meanwhile Jackson's (Colton Haynes) body seems to be fighting against the bite.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: The night before a full moon, Isaac's father (John Wesley Shipp) is murdered. When Isaac (Daniel Sharman) is arrested, Scott (Tyler Posey), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) resolve to break him out before the Argents get to him.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) tries to stop Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) from creating new werewolves, while Chris Argent (JR Bourne) decides to officially begin Allison's (Crystal Reed) training. Meanwhile, the new creature in Beacon Hills takes another victim.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: When the shapeshifter strikes again, Scott (Tyler Posey) has to recruit a reluctant Allison (Crystal Reed) to acquire a rare book from Gerard's (guest star Michael Hogan) collection, while also once again surviving dinner with the Argents.

programme.desc: Bette navigates the relationship with a potential donor. After a journalist's bad review leads to the failure of her book, Jenny seeks revenge.

programme.desc: The tryst between Bette and her T.A. threatens her new career. Tina discovers Angus with her nanny and Jenny publishes a story in "The New Yorker."

programme.desc: Bette enjoys a secret new romance as she clashes with Tina. Meanwhile, Max fears discrimination at work. Helena, Shane, and Alice learn to play poker.

programme.desc: Alice struggles to accept Tasha's nearing deployment. Tina and Kate exclude Jenny from a meeting with executives. Max seeks surgery in San Francisco.

programme.desc: Rebecca spends time with Nathaniel, Josh, and Greg in an attempt to get clarity on her feelings.

programme.desc: Rebecca makes a life-changing decision about her future that will change the course of her life.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca Bunch (Rachel Bloom) is a successful, driven, and possibly crazy young woman who impulsively gives up everything in a desperate attempt to find love and happiness in that exotic hotbed of romance and adventure: suburban West Covina, Calif.
programme.sub-title: Josh Just Happens to Live Here!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Rebecca learns that Josh has a gorgeous yoga instructor girlfriend named Valencia, she is determined to learn everything about her. Rebecca attempts to learn yoga and tries to get into the local nightclub Josh and Valencia go to.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: In an attempt to get closer to Josh, Rebecca throws a housewarming party despite her lack of social connections in West Covina and a childhood fear of hosting parties.
programme.sub-title: I Hope Josh Comes to My Party!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Rebecca learns that Josh and Valencia seem as happy as ever, she goes into a spiral and vows to make healthier choices. As a result, when nice guy Greg asks her out on a date, she wonders if that is the path towards a happier life.
programme.sub-title: I'm Going on a Date with Josh's Friend!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: After Rebecca and Greg's disastrous date, Greg accuses her of being a terrible person in front of Josh. Rebecca takes drastic measures to prove she is a good person, which includes helping Darryl with his messy divorce.
programme.sub-title: Josh and I Are Good People!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca scores an invite to the Chan family Thanksgiving festivities, where Josh's parents fall in love with her much to Valencia's dismay. Meanwhile, Greg struggles with taking care of his dad and wanting to pursue his dreams.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca has a tough week after learning some news about Josh and someone surprising shows up to help her - Dr. Phil. Paula is pursued by an important new client Calvin and not just professionally.
programme.sub-title: I'm So Happy that Josh is So Happy!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: It is the holidays and Rebecca's mom decides to come visit her in West Covina. Old habits die hard and Rebecca, eager to please her mom, embellishes some facts about her life, which all comes crashing down at a local holiday event.
programme.sub-title: My Mom, Greg's Mom and Josh's Sweet Dance Moves!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress Josh's friend group, Rebecca rents a party bus to take the group to the beach. On the trip, Rebecca learns more about her new friends than she expected and makes a surprising revelation herself.
programme.sub-title: I'm Going to the Beach with Josh and His Friends!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Rebecca finds out Josh is a volunteer at a camp for at-risk teens, she realizes it is the perfect opportunity to remind Josh about the amazing times they had together at camp.
programme.sub-title: I'm Back at Camp with Josh!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca mistakenly sends Josh a text meant for Paula and takes drastic measures to ensure he never sees it. Meanwhile, Paula and her husband attempt to rekindle their relationship, only to be thwarted by Rebecca.
programme.sub-title: That Text Was Not Meant for Josh!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: After the texting debacle, Rebecca attempts to recover by pursuing a case she thinks will bring her closer to Josh. Darryl tries to reconcile his feelings for White Josh.
programme.sub-title: Josh and I Work on a Case!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca and Josh head to Los Angeles to present their case, which also forces them to confront their long buried feelings. Greg grapples with his feelings for Rebecca, while Darryl and White Josh continue to explore their newfound feelings.
programme.sub-title: Josh and I Go to Los Angeles!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca learns that Josh has conflicted feelings for her and Darryl wants to let everyone know about his newfound bisexuality. Meanwhile, Greg must figure out how to work alongside Heather post break-up.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca gets stuck on a plane with her therapist, who takes her on a surprising journey. Meanwhile, in West Covina, Josh, Paula, Darryl and even a reluctant Greg come together to find Rebecca.
programme.sub-title: Josh Has No Idea Where I am!

programme.desc: The first episode in which Charlie – a baseball player with anger issues turned anger management therapist – decides to return to therapy after a bad run-in with his ex wife's new boyfriend.

programme.desc: Charlie deals with a ghost from his old carousing, baseball-playing days when a unattractive woman he slept with just to break a batting slump shows up as a new patient in group therapy.
